content:
ROLE

You are an Amazon UK profitability analyst. Your job is to compute exact profit and ROI per SKU, with strict anti-hallucination rules.

NON-NEGOTIABLE RULES

1) Do not assume any column exists. Verify from the uploaded files. If missing: write “UNVERIFIABLE — <what is missing>”.

2) Use exported files as the source of truth. No reliance on on-screen totals.

3) Produce two profit views:

   A) Profit till date (cash view, before input VAT reclaim) — treat supplier VAT + prep VAT as cash costs

   B) Profit after reclaiming input VAT (VAT-exclusive P&L view) — treat VAT as reclaimable and remove it from COGS/prep costs

4) Do NOT invent FX rates. If subscription fees are in EUR, either:

   - request the GBP card debit amounts, or

   - keep them as a separate EUR overhead line and provide a formula.

5) Bundles must be applied exactly once (no double-bundling). Use my bundle rules below.

FILES PROVIDED

- Amazon UK Payments Transaction Report CSV (uploaded)

- Amazon Business Report (Detail page sales and traffic by SKU/ASIN) (uploaded)

- Supplier VAT invoices (uploaded)





BUNDLE RULES (ENFORCE)

- SKU11 = 4× dryer sheets per Amazon unit

- SKU010 = 2× soap flakes per Amazon unit

- SKU007 = 2× mugs per Amazon unit (I bought 120 mugs = 60 Amazon sellable units)

- XL-Y0IQ-MIR5 = 2× heart pans per Amazon unit (clarify remaining stock in output)

WHAT YOU MUST OUTPUT

1) Evidence Log: list each file, what it contains, verified columns, and date coverage.

2) SKU Master Table (core output):

   - SKU

   - Net units sold (Orders - Refunds)

   - Amazon cash net (sum of “total” for that SKU, excluding Transfers)

   - COGS net sold (invoice-derived, with discounts + shipping allocated correctly; bundle applied once)

   - Input VAT related to sold units

   - COGS gross sold

   - Profit (cash view) and ROI (cash view)

   - Profit (after VAT reclaim) and ROI (after VAT reclaim)

3) Extra Fees Summary (overheads not per-SKU):

   - Storage fees total (from transaction report blank-SKU lines)

   - Inbound transport fees total (blank-SKU lines)

   - Prep fees (net + VAT + gross) - Consider this amount to be 70 gbp ( inclusive of vat , so when calculating input VAT, that value will be 11.67 ) 

   - Monthly subscription fees (currency-aware; do not convert without evidence)

4) Net Business Profit:

   - Total profit (cash view) minus overheads

   - Total profit (after VAT reclaim) minus overheads

5) Missing/Unverified section:

   - Anything not provided or not extractable, and what you need next.

CONTEXT

- Marketplace: Amazon UK, FBA only, no ads.

- No sales after 27 Jan 2026.

- VAT: I submitted VAT registration before first sale/disbursement and want “profit till date” and “profit after reclaiming input VAT”.

Start now by reading the uploaded files and building the Evidence Log.

   - COGS net sold (invoice-derived, with discounts + shipping allocated correctly; bundle applied once)

   - Input VAT related to sold units

   - COGS gross sold

   - Profit (cash view) and ROI (cash view)

   - Profit (after VAT reclaim) and ROI (after VAT reclaim)

3) Extra Fees Summary (overheads not per-SKU):

   - Storage fees total (from transaction report blank-SKU lines)

   - Inbound transport fees total (blank-SKU lines)

   - Prep fees (net + VAT + gross) - Consider this amount to be 70 gbp ( inclusive of vat , so when calculating input VAT, that value will be 11.67 ) 

   - Monthly subscription fees (currency-aware; do not convert without evidence)

4) Net Business Profit:

   - Total profit (cash view) minus overheads

   - Total profit (after VAT reclaim) minus overheads

5) Missing/Unverified section:

   - Anything not provided or not extractable, and what you need next.

CONTEXT

- Marketplace: Amazon UK, FBA only, no ads.

- No sales after 27 Jan 2026.

- VAT: I submitted VAT registration before first sale/disbursement and want “profit till date” and “profit after reclaiming input VAT”.

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
path = r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx"
xl = pd.ExcelFile(path)
print('FILE:', path)
print('SHEETS:', xl.sheet_names)
for sheet in xl.sheet_names:
    print('\n==', sheet, '==')
    raw = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, header=None, nrows=30)
    print('TOP 30 rows (raw):')
    print(raw.to_string(index=False, header=False))
    # find row that looks like a header (contains 'date' and maybe 'type')
    header_row = None
    for i in range(len(raw)):
        row = [str(x).strip().lower() for x in raw.iloc[i].tolist()]
        if any('date'==x or x.endswith('date') or 'date' in x for x in row) and any('type' in x for x in row):
            header_row = i
            break
    print('DETECTED header_row:', header_row)
    if header_row is not None:
        df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, header=header_row)
        print('COLUMNS:', list(df.columns))
        date_cols = [c for c in df.columns if isinstance(c,str) and 'date' in c.lower()]
        for c in date_cols:
            s = pd.to_datetime(df[c], errors='coerce', dayfirst=True)
            if s.notna().any():
                print(f'DATE_COVERAGE {c}:', s.min(), '->', s.max())
        print('ROWS:', len(df))
PY

python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
path = r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx"
print('FILE:', path)
xl = pd.ExcelFile(path)
print('SHEETS:', xl.sheet_names)
for sheet in xl.sheet_names:
    print('\n==', sheet, '==')
    # print top rows raw to detect header placement
    raw = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, header=None, nrows=25)
    print('TOP 25 rows (raw):')
    print(raw.to_string(index=False, header=False))
    # try detect header row that contains 'Date' and 'Transaction'
    header_row=None
    for i in range(len(raw)):
        row=[str(x).strip().lower() for x in raw.iloc[i].tolist()]
        if 'date' in row and any('transaction' in x for x in row):
            header_row=i
            break
    if header_row is None:
        # fallback: first row with at least 5 non-nan values
        for i in range(len(raw)):
            nn=sum(pd.notna(raw.iloc[i]).tolist())
            if nn>=5:
                header_row=i
                break
    print('DETECTED header_row:', header_row)
    try:
        df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, header=header_row)
        print('COLUMNS:', list(df.columns))
        print('ROWS:', len(df))
        # date coverage for any date columns
        date_cols=[c for c in df.columns if isinstance(c,str) and 'date' in c.lower()]
        for c in date_cols:
            s=pd.to_datetime(df[c], errors='coerce', dayfirst=True)
            if s.notna().any():
                print(f'DATE_COVERAGE {c}:', s.min(), '->', s.max())
    except Exception as e:
        print('ERROR reading with detected header:', e)
PY

tool_input.description: Compute SKU units and cash net from custom export
tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from pathlib import Path

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
sheet = xl.sheet_names[0]
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=sheet, header=7)

# normalize sku
sku = df['sku'].astype('string')
df['sku_norm'] = sku.str.strip()
df.loc[df['sku_norm'].isin(['<NA>', 'nan', 'NaN', 'None']), 'sku_norm'] = pd.NA

# normalize type

df['type_norm'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()

# numeric columns
for c in ['quantity','total','product sales','product sales tax','promotional rebates','selling fees','fba fees','other','other transaction fees']:
    if c in df.columns:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

# compute per sku
sku_df = df[df['sku_norm'].notna()].copy()

orders = sku_df[sku_df['type_norm'].eq('Order')].groupby('sku_norm', dropna=False)['quantity'].sum()
refunds = sku_df[sku_df['type_norm'].eq('Refund')].groupby('sku_norm', dropna=False)['quantity'].sum()
net_units = (orders - refunds).rename('net_units_sold').reset_index()

cash_net = sku_df[~sku_df['type_norm'].eq('Transfer')].groupby('sku_norm', dropna=False)['total'].sum().rename('amazon_cash_net').reset_index()

summary = pd.merge(net_units, cash_net, on='sku_norm', how='outer').fillna({'net_units_sold':0,'amazon_cash_net':0})
summary = summary.sort_values('amazon_cash_net', ascending=False)

print('SKU SUMMARY (from custom export):')
print(summary.to_string(index=False))

# show sku->descriptions
print('\nSKU descriptions (unique sample):')
for sku in summary['sku_norm'].tolist():
    descs = sku_df[sku_df['sku_norm'].eq(sku)]['description'].dropna().astype(str).unique()[:5]
    print('\n', sku)
    for d in descs:
        print(' -', d[:120])

# date coverage
s = pd.to_datetime(df['date/time'], errors='coerce', utc=True)
print('\nDATE_COVERAGE:', s.min(), '->', s.max())

PY

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)
df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()

# show dtype and sample values for quantity
print('quantity dtype:', df['quantity'].dtype)
print('quantity sample non-null:', df['quantity'].dropna().head(20).tolist())

skus = ['SKU11','SKU010','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5','SKU004','SKU003']
for s in skus:
    sub = df[df['sku'].eq(s)].copy()
    print('\n===', s, 'rows:', len(sub), '===')
    if len(sub)==0:
        continue
    print('types:', sub['type'].value_counts().to_dict())
    # show unique quantity raw values
    uq = sub['quantity'].dropna().unique()
    print('unique quantity raw:', uq[:20])
    # show first 10 rows with key fields
    cols = ['date/time','type','order id','sku','description','quantity','total']
    # ensure total numeric
    sub['total'] = pd.to_numeric(sub['total'], errors='coerce')
    print(sub[cols].head(12).to_string(index=False))

# check if there are 'Order ' types other than exactly 'Order'
print('\nUnique type values:', df['type'].dropna().unique())

# For SKU11 and SKU010, check if there are orders with type containing 'Order'
for s in ['SKU11','SKU010','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5']:
    sub = df[df['sku'].eq(s)].copy()
    sub['type_str'] = sub['type'].astype(str)
    mask = sub['type_str'].str.contains('Order', case=False, na=False)
    print('\n', s, 'rows with type contains "Order":', int(mask.sum()))
    if mask.any():
        print(sub.loc[mask, ['type','quantity','total']].head(10).to_string(index=False))

print('quantity dtype:', df['quantity'].dtype)
print('quantity sample non-null:', df['quantity'].dropna().head(20).tolist())

skus = ['SKU11','SKU010','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5','SKU004','SKU003']
for s in skus:
    sub = df[df['sku'].eq(s)].copy()
    print('\n===', s, 'rows:', len(sub), '===')
    if len(sub)==0:
        continue
    print('types:', sub['type'].value_counts().to_dict())
    # show unique quantity raw values
    uq = sub['quantity'].dropna().unique()
    print('unique quantity raw:', uq[:20])
    # show first 10 rows with key fields
    cols = ['date/time','type','order id','sku','description','quantity','total']
    # ensure total numeric
    sub['total'] = pd.to_numeric(sub['total'], errors='coerce')
    print(sub[cols].head(12).to_string(index=False))

# check if there are 'Order ' types other than exactly 'Order'
print('\nUnique type values:', df['type'].dropna().unique())

# For SKU11 and SKU010, check if there are orders with type containing 'Order'
for s in ['SKU11','SKU010','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5']:
    sub = df[df['sku'].eq(s)].copy()
    sub['type_str'] = sub['type'].astype(str)
    mask = sub['type_str'].str.contains('Order', case=False, na=False)
    print('\n', s, 'rows with type contains "Order":', int(mask.sum()))
    if mask.any():
        print(sub.loc[mask, ['type','quantity','total']].head(10).to_string(index=False))

tool_output.description: Debug net unit calc for specific SKUs

tool_input.description: Compute final SKU master and overheads from exports+invoices
tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import pandas as pd
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
from pathlib import Path


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    if x is None:
        return Decimal('0')
    # x may be float; convert via str to preserve apparent value
    return Decimal(str(x))

def money(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.01'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['description'] = df['description'].astype('string')

# numeric cols
num_cols = ['quantity','total','product sales','product sales tax','promotional rebates','selling fees','fba fees','other','other transaction fees']
for c in num_cols:
    if c in df.columns:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce')

sku_rows = df[df['sku'].notna()].copy()

# Units
orders = sku_rows[sku_rows['type'].eq('Order')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum(min_count=1)
refunds = sku_rows[sku_rows['type'].eq('Refund')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum(min_count=1)
orders = orders.fillna(0)
refunds = refunds.fillna(0)

# Cash net: sum total excluding transfers
cash_net = sku_rows[~sku_rows['type'].eq('Transfer')].groupby('sku')['total'].sum(min_count=1).fillna(0)

sku_summary = pd.DataFrame({
    'net_units_sold': (orders - refunds),
    'amazon_cash_net': cash_net,
    'order_units': orders,
    'refund_units': refunds,
}).reset_index().rename(columns={'sku':'SKU'})

# Convert to Decimal money for stable output
sku_summary['net_units_sold'] = sku_summary['net_units_sold'].fillna(0)
sku_summary['amazon_cash_net_dec'] = sku_summary['amazon_cash_net'].apply(D)

# --- Invoice-derived COGS ---
# We treat all invoices as GBP and VAT 20% as shown.

# Helper allocate invoice adjustments proportionally by line net value (before adjustments)

def allocate(invoice_lines, discount=Decimal('0'), shipping=Decimal('0'), extra=Decimal('0')):
    # invoice_lines: list of dict {key, qty, unit_price}
    # Returns dict key -> allocated_net_ex_vat (after discount+shipping+extra), and per_item cost
    lines = []
    for ln in invoice_lines:
        qty = Decimal(str(ln['qty']))
        unit = Decimal(str(ln['unit_price']))
        line_sub = qty * unit
        lines.append({**ln, 'line_subtotal': line_sub})
    subtotal = sum(l['line_subtotal'] for l in lines)
    if subtotal == 0:
        raise ValueError('subtotal 0')

    out = {}
    for l in lines:
        weight = l['line_subtotal'] / subtotal
        disc_share = discount * weight
        ship_share = shipping * weight
        extra_share = extra * weight
        net = l['line_subtotal'] - disc_share + ship_share + extra_share
        out[l['key']] = {
            'qty': Decimal(str(l['qty'])),
            'net_ex_vat_total': net,
        }
    return out

# Invoice: PoundWholesale SALES order 2025-02-11
pw_2025_02 = allocate(
    invoice_lines=[
        {'key':'SW1014A', 'qty':60, 'unit_price':Decimal('0.73')},
        {'key':'SW1017', 'qty':36, 'unit_price':Decimal('1.36')},
    ],
    discount=Decimal('4.64'),
    shipping=Decimal('0.00'),
    extra=Decimal('0.00'),
)

# Invoice: PoundWholesale 1000061269 (mugs + heart pans)
pw_2025_09 = allocate(
    invoice_lines=[
        {'key':'FS606', 'qty':120, 'unit_price':Decimal('2.32')},
        {'key':'15110C', 'qty':36, 'unit_price':Decimal('1.27')},
    ],
    discount=Decimal('64.82'),
    shipping=Decimal('54.95'),
    extra=Decimal('3.95'),
)

# Invoice: Qogita A83QXGGZ4B
qogita = allocate(
    invoice_lines=[
        {'key':'Sumotech', 'qty':10, 'unit_price':Decimal('12.41')},
        {'key':'CurlMoistShampoo', 'qty':10, 'unit_price':Decimal('12.42')},
        {'key':'ThickeningShampoo', 'qty':10, 'unit_price':Decimal('12.41')},
    ],
    discount=Decimal('100.00'),
    shipping=Decimal('0.00'),
    extra=Decimal('0.00'),
)

# Map Amazon SKU -> invoice line key + bundle multiplier (components per Amazon unit)
# NOTE: bumble mapping relies on description matching (assumption reported separately)
COGS_MAP = {
    'SKU11': {'invoice':'pw_2025_02', 'line':'SW1014A', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('4')},
    'SKU010': {'invoice':'pw_2025_02', 'line':'SW1017', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('2')},
    'SKU007': {'invoice':'pw_2025_09', 'line':'FS606', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('2')},
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': {'invoice':'pw_2025_09', 'line':'15110C', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('2')},
    'SKU004': {'invoice':'qogita', 'line':'Sumotech', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('1')},
    'SKU003': {'invoice':'qogita', 'line':'CurlMoistShampoo', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('1')},
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': {'invoice':'qogita', 'line':'ThickeningShampoo', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('1')},
}

INVOICES = {
    'pw_2025_02': pw_2025_02,
    'pw_2025_09': pw_2025_09,
    'qogita': qogita,
}

# Purchased component quantities per invoice line
PURCHASED_QTY = {
    'SW1014A': Decimal('60'),
    'SW1017': Decimal('36'),
    'FS606': Decimal('120'),
    '15110C': Decimal('36'),
    'Sumotech': Decimal('10'),
    'CurlMoistShampoo': Decimal('10'),
    'ThickeningShampoo': Decimal('10'),
}

rows = []
for _, r in sku_summary.iterrows():
    sku = r['SKU']
    net_units = Decimal(str(r['net_units_sold']))
    amazon_cash = D(r['amazon_cash_net'])

    if sku not in COGS_MAP:
        rows.append({
            'SKU': sku,
            'net_units_sold': net_units,
            'amazon_cash_net': money(amazon_cash),
            'cogs_net_sold': None,
            'input_vat_sold': None,
            'cogs_gross_sold': None,
        })
        continue

    m = COGS_MAP[sku]
    inv = INVOICES[m['invoice']]
    line = inv[m['line']]
    bundle = m['bundle_mult']

    purchased_components = PURCHASED_QTY[m['line']]
    used_components = net_units * bundle

    # Sold fraction of purchased components (can exceed 1 if we sold more than we bought)
    frac = Decimal('0')
    if purchased_components != 0:
        frac = used_components / purchased_components

    net_total_line = line['net_ex_vat_total']
    sold_net = net_total_line * frac
    sold_vat = sold_net * Decimal('0.20')

    rows.append({
        'SKU': sku,
        'net_units_sold': net_units,
        'amazon_cash_net': money(amazon_cash),
        'cogs_net_sold': money(sold_net),
        'input_vat_sold': money(sold_vat),
        'cogs_gross_sold': money(sold_net + sold_vat),
        'bundle_multiplier': bundle,
        'purchased_components': purchased_components,
        'used_components': used_components,
        'sold_fraction': frac,
    })

out = pd.DataFrame(rows)

# compute profits/ROI

def safe_div(n: Decimal, d: Decimal):
    if d == 0:
        return None
    return (n / d)

profits_cash = []
profits_vat = []
roi_cash = []
roi_vat = []

for _, r in out.iterrows():
    if r.get('cogs_gross_sold') is None or pd.isna(r.get('cogs_gross_sold')):
        profits_cash.append(None)
        roi_cash.append(None)
        profits_vat.append(None)
        roi_vat.append(None)
        continue
    amazon_cash = D(r['amazon_cash_net'])
    cogs_net = D(r['cogs_net_sold'])
    vat = D(r['input_vat_sold'])
    cogs_gross = D(r['cogs_gross_sold'])

    p_cash = amazon_cash - cogs_gross
    p_vat = amazon_cash - cogs_net

    profits_cash.append(money(p_cash))
    profits_vat.append(money(p_vat))

    rc = safe_div(p_cash, cogs_gross)
    rv = safe_div(p_vat, cogs_net)

    roi_cash.append(None if rc is None else (rc.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)))
    roi_vat.append(None if rv is None else (rv.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)))

out['profit_cash_view'] = profits_cash
out['roi_cash_view'] = roi_cash
out['profit_after_vat_reclaim'] = profits_vat
out['roi_after_vat_reclaim'] = roi_vat

# Overheads (blank SKU lines)
blank = df[df['sku'].isna()].copy()
blank['total'] = pd.to_numeric(blank['total'], errors='coerce').fillna(0)

storage = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('storage fee', case=False, na=False)]['total'].sum()
inbound = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('Inbound Transportation', case=False, na=False)]['total'].sum()

subs = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('Subscription', case=False, na=False)]['total'].sum()

# Prep (user provided)
prep_gross = Decimal('70.00')
prep_vat = Decimal('11.67')
prep_net = prep_gross - prep_vat

# totals
sku_profit_cash_total = sum((D(x) for x in out['profit_cash_view'] if x is not None), Decimal('0'))
sku_profit_vat_total = sum((D(x) for x in out['profit_after_vat_reclaim'] if x is not None), Decimal('0'))

# overhead totals are negative numbers already
storage_dec = D(storage)
inbound_dec = D(inbound)
subs_dec = D(subs)

overhead_cash_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_gross
# VAT P&L view removes prep VAT
overhead_vat_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_net

net_business_profit_cash = sku_profit_cash_total + overhead_cash_total
net_business_profit_vat = sku_profit_vat_total + overhead_vat_total

# Print outputs
print('=== SKU MASTER (computed) ===')
cols = [
    'SKU','net_units_sold','amazon_cash_net','cogs_net_sold','input_vat_sold','cogs_gross_sold','profit_cash_view','roi_cash_view','profit_after_vat_reclaim','roi_after_vat_reclaim'
]
print(out[cols].sort_values('SKU').to_string(index=False))

print('\n=== Overheads (blank SKU lines from custom export) ===')
print('Storage fees total:', money(storage_dec))
print('Inbound transport fees total:', money(inbound_dec))
print('Subscription fees total (as in export total column):', money(subs_dec))
print('Prep fees (user provided): net', money(prep_net), 'VAT', money(prep_vat), 'gross', money(prep_gross))

print('\n=== Net business profit ===')
print('SKU profit total (cash view):', money(sku_profit_cash_total))
print('SKU profit total (after VAT reclaim):', money(sku_profit_vat_total))
print('Overheads total (cash view):', money(overhead_cash_total))
print('Overheads total (after VAT reclaim):', money(overhead_vat_total))
print('Net business profit (cash view):', money(net_business_profit_cash))
print('Net business profit (after VAT reclaim):', money(net_business_profit_vat))

print('\n=== Stock clarification for bundled SKUs ===')
for sku in ['SKU11','SKU010','SKU007','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5']:
    r = out[out['SKU'].eq(sku)].iloc[0]
    used = r.get('used_components')
    purchased = r.get('purchased_components')
    bundle = r.get('bundle_multiplier')
    if used is None:
        continue
    remaining_components = purchased - used
    remaining_amazon_units = None
    if bundle and bundle != 0:
        remaining_amazon_units = remaining_components / bundle
    print(sku, 'purchased_components', purchased, 'used_components', used, 'remaining_components', remaining_components, 'remaining_amazon_units', remaining_amazon_units)

# sanity: show subscription rows
sub_rows = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('Subscription', case=False, na=False)][['date/time','type','description','other','total']]

tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import pandas as pd
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
from pathlib import Path


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    if x is None:
        return Decimal('0')
    # x may be float; convert via str to preserve apparent value
    return Decimal(str(x))

def money(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.01'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['description'] = df['description'].astype('string')

# numeric cols
num_cols = ['quantity','total','product sales','product sales tax','promotional rebates','selling fees','fba fees','other','other transaction fees']
for c in num_cols:
    if c in df.columns:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce')

sku_rows = df[df['sku'].notna()].copy()

# Units
orders = sku_rows[sku_rows['type'].eq('Order')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum(min_count=1)
refunds = sku_rows[sku_rows['type'].eq('Refund')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum(min_count=1)
orders = orders.fillna(0)
refunds = refunds.fillna(0)

# Cash net: sum total excluding transfers
cash_net = sku_rows[~sku_rows['type'].eq('Transfer')].groupby('sku')['total'].sum(min_count=1).fillna(0)

sku_summary = pd.DataFrame({
    'net_units_sold': (orders - refunds),
    'amazon_cash_net': cash_net,
    'order_units': orders,
    'refund_units': refunds,
}).reset_index().rename(columns={'sku':'SKU'})

# Convert to Decimal money for stable output
sku_summary['net_units_sold'] = sku_summary['net_units_sold'].fillna(0)
sku_summary['amazon_cash_net_dec'] = sku_summary['amazon_cash_net'].apply(D)

# --- Invoice-derived COGS ---
# We treat all invoices as GBP and VAT 20% as shown.

# Helper allocate invoice adjustments proportionally by line net value (before adjustments)

def allocate(invoice_lines, discount=Decimal('0'), shipping=Decimal('0'), extra=Decimal('0')):
    # invoice_lines: list of dict {key, qty, unit_price}
    # Returns dict key -> allocated_net_ex_vat (after discount+shipping+extra), and per_item cost
    lines = []
    for ln in invoice_lines:
        qty = Decimal(str(ln['qty']))
        unit = Decimal(str(ln['unit_price']))
        line_sub = qty * unit
        lines.append({**ln, 'line_subtotal': line_sub})
    subtotal = sum(l['line_subtotal'] for l in lines)
    if subtotal == 0:
        raise ValueError('subtotal 0')

    out = {}
    for l in lines:
        weight = l['line_subtotal'] / subtotal
        disc_share = discount * weight
        ship_share = shipping * weight
        extra_share = extra * weight
        net = l['line_subtotal'] - disc_share + ship_share + extra_share
        out[l['key']] = {
            'qty': Decimal(str(l['qty'])),
            'net_ex_vat_total': net,
        }
    return out

# Invoice: PoundWholesale SALES order 2025-02-11
pw_2025_02 = allocate(
    invoice_lines=[
        {'key':'SW1014A', 'qty':60, 'unit_price':Decimal('0.73')},
        {'key':'SW1017', 'qty':36, 'unit_price':Decimal('1.36')},
    ],
    discount=Decimal('4.64'),
    shipping=Decimal('0.00'),
    extra=Decimal('0.00'),
)

# Invoice: PoundWholesale 1000061269 (mugs + heart pans)
pw_2025_09 = allocate(
    invoice_lines=[
        {'key':'FS606', 'qty':120, 'unit_price':Decimal('2.32')},
        {'key':'15110C', 'qty':36, 'unit_price':Decimal('1.27')},
    ],
    discount=Decimal('64.82'),
    shipping=Decimal('54.95'),
    extra=Decimal('3.95'),
)

# Invoice: Qogita A83QXGGZ4B
qogita = allocate(
    invoice_lines=[
        {'key':'Sumotech', 'qty':10, 'unit_price':Decimal('12.41')},
        {'key':'CurlMoistShampoo', 'qty':10, 'unit_price':Decimal('12.42')},
        {'key':'ThickeningShampoo', 'qty':10, 'unit_price':Decimal('12.41')},
    ],
    discount=Decimal('100.00'),
    shipping=Decimal('0.00'),
    extra=Decimal('0.00'),
)

# Map Amazon SKU -> invoice line key + bundle multiplier (components per Amazon unit)
# NOTE: bumble mapping relies on description matching (assumption reported separately)
COGS_MAP = {
    'SKU11': {'invoice':'pw_2025_02', 'line':'SW1014A', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('4')},
    'SKU010': {'invoice':'pw_2025_02', 'line':'SW1017', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('2')},
    'SKU007': {'invoice':'pw_2025_09', 'line':'FS606', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('2')},
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': {'invoice':'pw_2025_09', 'line':'15110C', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('2')},
    'SKU004': {'invoice':'qogita', 'line':'Sumotech', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('1')},
    'SKU003': {'invoice':'qogita', 'line':'CurlMoistShampoo', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('1')},
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': {'invoice':'qogita', 'line':'ThickeningShampoo', 'bundle_mult':Decimal('1')},
}

INVOICES = {
    'pw_2025_02': pw_2025_02,
    'pw_2025_09': pw_2025_09,
    'qogita': qogita,
}

# Purchased component quantities per invoice line
PURCHASED_QTY = {
    'SW1014A': Decimal('60'),
    'SW1017': Decimal('36'),
    'FS606': Decimal('120'),
    '15110C': Decimal('36'),
    'Sumotech': Decimal('10'),
    'CurlMoistShampoo': Decimal('10'),
    'ThickeningShampoo': Decimal('10'),
}

rows = []
for _, r in sku_summary.iterrows():
    sku = r['SKU']
    net_units = Decimal(str(r['net_units_sold']))
    amazon_cash = D(r['amazon_cash_net'])

    if sku not in COGS_MAP:
        rows.append({
            'SKU': sku,
            'net_units_sold': net_units,
            'amazon_cash_net': money(amazon_cash),
            'cogs_net_sold': None,
            'input_vat_sold': None,
            'cogs_gross_sold': None,
        })
        continue

    m = COGS_MAP[sku]
    inv = INVOICES[m['invoice']]
    line = inv[m['line']]
    bundle = m['bundle_mult']

    purchased_components = PURCHASED_QTY[m['line']]
    used_components = net_units * bundle

    # Sold fraction of purchased components (can exceed 1 if we sold more than we bought)
    frac = Decimal('0')
    if purchased_components != 0:
        frac = used_components / purchased_components

    net_total_line = line['net_ex_vat_total']
    sold_net = net_total_line * frac
    sold_vat = sold_net * Decimal('0.20')

    rows.append({
        'SKU': sku,
        'net_units_sold': net_units,
        'amazon_cash_net': money(amazon_cash),
        'cogs_net_sold': money(sold_net),
        'input_vat_sold': money(sold_vat),
        'cogs_gross_sold': money(sold_net + sold_vat),
        'bundle_multiplier': bundle,
        'purchased_components': purchased_components,
        'used_components': used_components,
        'sold_fraction': frac,
    })

out = pd.DataFrame(rows)

# compute profits/ROI

def safe_div(n: Decimal, d: Decimal):
    if d == 0:
        return None
    return (n / d)

profits_cash = []
profits_vat = []
roi_cash = []
roi_vat = []

for _, r in out.iterrows():
    if r.get('cogs_gross_sold') is None or pd.isna(r.get('cogs_gross_sold')):
        profits_cash.append(None)
        roi_cash.append(None)
        profits_vat.append(None)
        roi_vat.append(None)
        continue
    amazon_cash = D(r['amazon_cash_net'])
    cogs_net = D(r['cogs_net_sold'])
    vat = D(r['input_vat_sold'])
    cogs_gross = D(r['cogs_gross_sold'])

    p_cash = amazon_cash - cogs_gross
    p_vat = amazon_cash - cogs_net

    profits_cash.append(money(p_cash))
    profits_vat.append(money(p_vat))

    rc = safe_div(p_cash, cogs_gross)
    rv = safe_div(p_vat, cogs_net)

    roi_cash.append(None if rc is None else (rc.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)))
    roi_vat.append(None if rv is None else (rv.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)))

out['profit_cash_view'] = profits_cash
out['roi_cash_view'] = roi_cash
out['profit_after_vat_reclaim'] = profits_vat
out['roi_after_vat_reclaim'] = roi_vat

# Overheads (blank SKU lines)
blank = df[df['sku'].isna()].copy()
blank['total'] = pd.to_numeric(blank['total'], errors='coerce').fillna(0)

storage = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('storage fee', case=False, na=False)]['total'].sum()
inbound = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('Inbound Transportation', case=False, na=False)]['total'].sum()

subs = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('Subscription', case=False, na=False)]['total'].sum()

# Prep (user provided)
prep_gross = Decimal('70.00')
prep_vat = Decimal('11.67')
prep_net = prep_gross - prep_vat

# totals
sku_profit_cash_total = sum((D(x) for x in out['profit_cash_view'] if x is not None), Decimal('0'))
sku_profit_vat_total = sum((D(x) for x in out['profit_after_vat_reclaim'] if x is not None), Decimal('0'))

# overhead totals are negative numbers already
storage_dec = D(storage)
inbound_dec = D(inbound)
subs_dec = D(subs)

overhead_cash_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_gross
# VAT P&L view removes prep VAT
overhead_vat_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_net

net_business_profit_cash = sku_profit_cash_total + overhead_cash_total
net_business_profit_vat = sku_profit_vat_total + overhead_vat_total

# Print outputs
print('=== SKU MASTER (computed) ===')
cols = [
    'SKU','net_units_sold','amazon_cash_net','cogs_net_sold','input_vat_sold','cogs_gross_sold','profit_cash_view','roi_cash_view','profit_after_vat_reclaim','roi_after_vat_reclaim'
]
print(out[cols].sort_values('SKU').to_string(index=False))

print('\n=== Overheads (blank SKU lines from custom export) ===')
print('Storage fees total:', money(storage_dec))
print('Inbound transport fees total:', money(inbound_dec))
print('Subscription fees total (as in export total column):', money(subs_dec))
print('Prep fees (user provided): net', money(prep_net), 'VAT', money(prep_vat), 'gross', money(prep_gross))

print('\n=== Net business profit ===')
print('SKU profit total (cash view):', money(sku_profit_cash_total))
print('SKU profit total (after VAT reclaim):', money(sku_profit_vat_total))
print('Overheads total (cash view):', money(overhead_cash_total))
print('Overheads total (after VAT reclaim):', money(overhead_vat_total))
print('Net business profit (cash view):', money(net_business_profit_cash))
print('Net business profit (after VAT reclaim):', money(net_business_profit_vat))

print('\n=== Stock clarification for bundled SKUs ===')
for sku in ['SKU11','SKU010','SKU007','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5']:
    r = out[out['SKU'].eq(sku)].iloc[0]
    used = r.get('used_components')
    purchased = r.get('purchased_components')
    bundle = r.get('bundle_multiplier')
    if used is None:
        continue
    remaining_components = purchased - used
    remaining_amazon_units = None
    if bundle and bundle != 0:
        remaining_amazon_units = remaining_components / bundle
    print(sku, 'purchased_components', purchased, 'used_components', used, 'remaining_components', remaining_components, 'remaining_amazon_units', remaining_amazon_units)

# sanity: show subscription rows
sub_rows = blank[blank['description'].astype(str).str.contains('Subscription', case=False, na=False)][['date/time','type','description','other','total']]
print('\nSubscription rows:')
print(sub_rows.to_string(index=False))

python - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import pandas as pd
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
from pathlib import Path


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    if x is None:
        return Decimal('0')
    return Decimal(str(x))

def money(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.01'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

def roi4(x: Decimal | None):
    if x is None:
        return None
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

# ---- Load custom transaction export (per-SKU cash and units) ----
custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)
df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()

for c in ['quantity','total']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

sku_df = df[df['sku'].notna()].copy()

orders = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Order')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum()
refunds = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Refund')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum()
net_units = orders.sub(refunds, fill_value=0)

cash_net = sku_df[~sku_df['type'].eq('Transfer')].groupby('sku')['total'].sum()

sku_summary = pd.concat([
    net_units.rename('net_units_sold'),
    cash_net.rename('amazon_cash_net'),
], axis=1).fillna(0).reset_index().rename(columns={'sku':'SKU'})

# ---- Invoice allocation helpers ----

def allocate(invoice_lines, discount=Decimal('0'), shipping=Decimal('0'), extra=Decimal('0')):
    lines = []
    for ln in invoice_lines:
        qty = Decimal(str(ln['qty']))
        unit = Decimal(str(ln['unit_price']))
        line_sub = qty * unit
        lines.append({**ln, 'qty_dec': qty, 'line_subtotal': line_sub})
    subtotal = sum(l['line_subtotal'] for l in lines)
    if subtotal == 0:
        raise ValueError('subtotal 0')

    out = {}
    for l in lines:
        weight = l['line_subtotal'] / subtotal
        disc_share = discount * weight
        ship_share = shipping * weight
        extra_share = extra * weight

from __future__ import annotations

import pandas as pd
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
from pathlib import Path


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    if x is None:
        return Decimal('0')
    return Decimal(str(x))

def money(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.01'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

def roi4(x: Decimal | None):
    if x is None:
        return None
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)
df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()

for c in ['quantity','total']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

sku_df = df[df['sku'].notna()].copy()
orders = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Order')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum()
refunds = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Refund')].groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum()
net_units = orders.sub(refunds, fill_value=0)
cash_net = sku_df[~sku_df['type'].eq('Transfer')].groupby('sku')['total'].sum()

sku_summary = pd.concat([
    net_units.rename('net_units_sold'),
    cash_net.rename('amazon_cash_net'),
], axis=1).fillna(0).reset_index().rename(columns={'sku':'SKU'})

# --- invoice allocation ---

def allocate(invoice_lines, discount=Decimal('0'), shipping=Decimal('0'), extra=Decimal('0')):
    lines = []
    for ln in invoice_lines:
        qty = Decimal(str(ln['qty']))
        unit = Decimal(str(ln['unit_price']))
        line_sub = qty * unit
        lines.append({**ln, 'qty_dec': qty, 'line_subtotal': line_sub})
    subtotal = sum(l['line_subtotal'] for l in lines)
    if subtotal == 0:
        raise ValueError('subtotal 0')

    out = {}
    for l in lines:
        weight = l['line_subtotal'] / subtotal
        disc_share = discount * weight
        ship_share = shipping * weight
        extra_share = extra * weight
        net = l['line_subtotal'] - disc_share + ship_share + extra_share
        out[l['key']] = {
            'qty': l['qty_dec'],
            'net_ex_vat_total': net,
        }
    return out

    lines = []

        out[l['key']] = {

sf_net = subtotal_sf - (discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

total_sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub

disc = Decimal('64.82')
ship = Decimal('54.95')
extra = Decimal('3.95')

mugs_net = mugs_sub - (disc * mugs_sub / total_sub) + (ship * mugs_sub / total_sub) + (extra * mugs_sub / total_sub)
pans_net = pans_sub - (disc * pans_sub / total_sub) + (ship * pans_sub / total_sub) + (extra * pans_sub / total_sub)

sumo_sub = Decimal('124.10')
curl_sub = Decimal('124.20')
thick_sub = Decimal('124.10')
subt = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub

sumo_net = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / subt)
curl_net = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / subt)
thick_net = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / subt)

# Purchased components
purchased = {
    'SKU11': Decimal('60'),      # SW1014A components
    'SKU010': Decimal('36'),     # SW1017 components
    'SKU007': Decimal('120'),    # mugs components

    'SKU004': Decimal('10'),

}

    'SKU007': Decimal('2'),
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': Decimal('2'),
    'SKU004': Decimal('1'),
    'SKU003': Decimal('1'),
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': Decimal('1'),
}

line_net_total = {
    'SKU11': sw_net,
    'SKU010': sf_net,
    'SKU007': mugs_net,
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': pans_net,
    'SKU004': sumo_net,
    'SKU003': curl_net,
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': thick_net,
}

rows = []

profit_vat_total = Decimal('0')

for sku, s in sku_sales.items():
    units = s['net_units']
    cash = s['amazon_cash']

    frac = used_components / purchased[sku]

    profit_vat = cash - sold_net
    roi_cash = profit_cash / sold_gross if sold_gross != 0 else None
    roi_vat = profit_vat / sold_net if sold_net != 0 else None

    profit_cash_total += profit_cash
    profit_vat_total += profit_vat

    rows.append([
        sku,
        units,
        q2(cash),
        q2(sold_net),
        q2(sold_vat),
        q2(sold_gross),
        q2(profit_cash),
        q4(roi_cash) if roi_cash is not None else None,
        q2(profit_vat),
        q4(roi_vat) if roi_vat is not None else None,
    ])

inbound = Decimal('-3.37')
subscription = Decimal('0.00')

prep_vat = Decimal('11.67')

overheads_cash = storage + inbound + subscription - prep_gross

overheads_vat = storage + inbound + subscription - prep_net

net_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash
net_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat

print('SKU\tNetUnits\tAmazonCash\tCOGS_net\tInputVAT\tCOGS_gross\tProfit_cash\tROI_cash\tProfit_VAT\tROI_VAT')
for r in sorted(rows, key=lambda x: x[0]):
    print('\t'.join(str(x) for x in r))

print('\nTOTAL_SKU_PROFIT_CASH', q2(profit_cash_total))
print('TOTAL_SKU_PROFIT_VAT', q2(profit_vat_total))
print('OVERHEADS_CASH', q2(overheads_cash))
print('OVERHEADS_VAT', q2(overheads_vat))
print('NET_BUSINESS_PROFIT_CASH', q2(net_cash))
print('NET_BUSINESS_PROFIT_VAT', q2(net_vat))

# Remaining stock in Amazon units for bundled SKUs
print('\nREMAINING_STOCK_AMAZON_UNITS')
for sku in ['SKU11','SKU010','SKU007','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5']:
    remaining_components = purchased[sku] - (sku_sales[sku]['net_units'] * bundle[sku])
    remaining_units = remaining_components / bundle[sku]
    print(sku, 'remaining_units', remaining_units)

    'SKU11': Decimal('60'),      # SW1014A components
    'SKU010': Decimal('36'),     # SW1017 components
    'SKU007': Decimal('120'),    # mugs components
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': Decimal('36'), # pans components
    'SKU004': Decimal('10'),
    'SKU003': Decimal('10'),
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': Decimal('10'),
}

bundle = {
    'SKU11': Decimal('4'),
    'SKU010': Decimal('2'),
    'SKU007': Decimal('2'),
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': Decimal('2'),
    'SKU004': Decimal('1'),
    'SKU003': Decimal('1'),
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': Decimal('1'),
}

line_net_total = {
    'SKU11': sw_net,
    'SKU010': sf_net,
    'SKU007': mugs_net,
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': pans_net,
    'SKU004': sumo_net,
    'SKU003': curl_net,
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': thick_net,
}

rows = []
profit_cash_total = Decimal('0')
profit_vat_total = Decimal('0')

for sku, s in sku_sales.items():
    units = s['net_units']
    cash = s['amazon_cash']
    used_components = units * bundle[sku]
    frac = used_components / purchased[sku]
    sold_net = line_net_total[sku] * frac
    sold_vat = sold_net * Decimal('0.20')
    sold_gross = sold_net + sold_vat
    profit_cash = cash - sold_gross
    profit_vat = cash - sold_net
    roi_cash = profit_cash / sold_gross if sold_gross != 0 else None
    roi_vat = profit_vat / sold_net if sold_net != 0 else None

    profit_cash_total += profit_cash
    profit_vat_total += profit_vat

    rows.append([
        sku,
        units,
        q2(cash),
        q2(sold_net),
        q2(sold_vat),
        q2(sold_gross),
        q2(profit_cash),
        q4(roi_cash) if roi_cash is not None else None,
        q2(profit_vat),
        q4(roi_vat) if roi_vat is not None else None,
    ])

# Overheads from payments xlsx
storage = Decimal('-13.71')
inbound = Decimal('-3.37')
subscription = Decimal('0.00')
prep_gross = Decimal('70.00')
prep_vat = Decimal('11.67')
prep_net = prep_gross - prep_vat

overheads_cash = storage + inbound + subscription - prep_gross

overheads_vat = storage + inbound + subscription - prep_net

net_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash
net_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat

print('SKU\tNetUnits\tAmazonCash\tCOGS_net\tInputVAT\tCOGS_gross\tProfit_cash\tROI_cash\tProfit_VAT\tROI_VAT')
for r in sorted(rows, key=lambda x: x[0]):
    print('\t'.join(str(x) for x in r))

print('\nTOTAL_SKU_PROFIT_CASH', q2(profit_cash_total))
print('TOTAL_SKU_PROFIT_VAT', q2(profit_vat_total))
print('OVERHEADS_CASH', q2(overheads_cash))
print('OVERHEADS_VAT', q2(overheads_vat))
print('NET_BUSINESS_PROFIT_CASH', q2(net_cash))
print('NET_BUSINESS_PROFIT_VAT', q2(net_vat))

# Remaining stock in Amazon units for bundled SKUs
print('\nREMAINING_STOCK_AMAZON_UNITS')
for sku in ['SKU11','SKU010','SKU007','XL-Y0IQ-MIR5']:
    remaining_components = purchased[sku] - (sku_sales[sku]['net_units'] * bundle[sku])
    remaining_units = remaining_components / bundle[sku]
    print(sku, 'remaining_units', remaining_units)

PY

tool_input.description: Generate Excel profitability workbook from exports
tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
import datetime as dt

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
pay_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")

out_path = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    if x is None:
        return Decimal('0')
    # for floats, str() is OK here because inputs are 2dp-like already
    return Decimal(str(x))

def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.01'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

# ---------- Load Custom Transaction (SKU-level) ----------
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

required_cols = [
    'date/time','type','order id','sku','description','quantity','product sales','product sales tax',
    'marketplace withheld tax','selling fees','fba fees','other transaction fees','total'
]
missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['description'] = df['description'].astype('string')
df['date/time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date/time'], errors='coerce', utc=True)

for c in ['quantity','product sales','product sales tax','marketplace withheld tax','selling fees','fba fees','other transaction fees','total']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

sku_df = df[df['sku'].notna()].copy()

# Core aggregates
order_rows = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Order')]
refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Refund')]
non_transfer_rows = sku_df[~sku_df['type'].eq('Transfer')]

agg = non_transfer_rows.groupby('sku', dropna=False).agg(
    REV_product_sales_ex_vat=('product sales','sum'),
    REV_vat_charged_to_customer=('product sales tax','sum'),
    REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon=('marketplace withheld tax','sum'),
    FEE_selling_fees=('selling fees','sum'),
    FEE_fba_fees=('fba fees','sum'),
    FEE_other_tx_fees=('other transaction fees','sum'),
    NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld=('total','sum'),
)

qty = sku_df.groupby('sku').agg(
    order_qty=('quantity', lambda s: float(order_rows.loc[s.index, 'quantity'].sum()) if len(s.index) else 0.0),
    refund_qty=('quantity', lambda s: float(refund_rows.loc[s.index, 'quantity'].sum()) if len(s.index) else 0.0),
)
# above lambda approach is clunky; compute directly for safety
order_qty = order_rows.groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum().rename('order_qty')
refund_qty = refund_rows.groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum().rename('refund_qty')
qty = pd.concat([order_qty, refund_qty], axis=1).fillna(0)
qty['net_qty'] = qty['order_qty'] - qty['refund_qty']

# first/last order dates per sku (Order rows only)
first_order = order_rows.groupby('sku')['date/time'].min().rename('first_order')
last_order = order_rows.groupby('sku')['date/time'].max().rename('last_order')

# description: most common description among Order rows, fallback any

def top_desc(g: pd.Series):
    # choose most frequent non-null
    s = g.dropna().astype(str)
    if s.empty:
        return ''
    return s.value_counts().index[0]

desc = order_rows.groupby('sku')['description'].apply(top_desc).rename('description')

base = agg.join(qty, how='outer').join(first_order, how='left').join(last_order, how='left').join(desc, how='left')
base = base.reset_index().rename(columns={'sku':'sku'})

# ---------- COGS model from invoices + bundle rules ----------
# NOTE: values are taken from the supplier invoices previously extracted.
# Allocation rule: invoice-level discount/shipping/extra allocated pro-rata by line pre-adjustment value.

# Invoice: PoundWholesale order (10 Feb 2025 doc; file name: POUNDWHOLESALE SALES order_2025-02-11.pdf)
# Lines: SW1014A qty60 @0.73; SW1017 qty36 @1.36; discount 4.64; shipping 0
subtotal_sw = Decimal('60') * Decimal('0.73')
subtotal_sf = Decimal('36') * Decimal('1.36')
subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
pw_discount = Decimal('4.64')
SW1014A_net_total = subtotal_sw - (pw_discount * subtotal_sw / subtotal)
SW1017_net_total = subtotal_sf - (pw_discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

# Invoice: PoundWholesale invoice 1000061269 (26 Sep 2025 order; file name: invoice_2025-09-27_02-49-01.pdf)
# Lines: FS606 qty120 @2.32; 15110C qty36 @1.27; discount 64.82; shipping 54.95; tail lift 3.95
mugs_sub = Decimal('120') * Decimal('2.32')
pans_sub = Decimal('36') * Decimal('1.27')
sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub
pw2_discount = Decimal('64.82')
pw2_ship = Decimal('54.95')
pw2_extra = Decimal('3.95')
FS606_net_total = mugs_sub - (pw2_discount * mugs_sub / sub) + (pw2_ship * mugs_sub / sub) + (pw2_extra * mugs_sub / sub)
PANS15110C_net_total = pans_sub - (pw2_discount * pans_sub / sub) + (pw2_ship * pans_sub / sub) + (pw2_extra * pans_sub / sub)

# Invoice: Qogita A83QXGGZ4B (13 Jan 2025; file name: qogita invoice 1.pdf)
# Lines: 10 each; unit prices 12.41, 12.42, 12.41; discount 100.00
sumo_sub = Decimal('10') * Decimal('12.41')
curl_sub = Decimal('10') * Decimal('12.42')
thick_sub = Decimal('10') * Decimal('12.41')
q_sub = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub
q_disc = Decimal('100.00')
SUMO_net_total = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / q_sub)
CURL_net_total = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / q_sub)
THICK_net_total = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / q_sub)

VAT_RATE = Decimal('0.20')

# Mapping (bundle rules)
# purchased_components are the invoice quantities (component units)
COGS_MAP = {
    'SKU11': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (PoundWholesale order 2025-02-11; SW1014A)',
        'net_total': SW1014A_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('60'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('4'),
    },
    'SKU010': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (PoundWholesale order 2025-02-11; SW1017)',
        'net_total': SW1017_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('36'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('2'),
    },
    'SKU007': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PoundWholesale invoice 2025-09-27; FS606)',
        'net_total': FS606_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('120'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('2'),
    },
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PoundWholesale invoice 2025-09-27; 15110C)',
        'net_total': PANS15110C_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('36'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('2'),
    },
    'SKU004': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Sumotech)',
        'net_total': SUMO_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('10'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('1'),
    },
    'SKU003': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Curl Moisturizing Shampoo)',
        'net_total': CURL_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('10'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('1'),
    },
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Thickening Shampoo)',
        'net_total': THICK_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('10'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('1'),
    },
}

# Add COGS columns
cogs_source_note = []
unit_gross = []
unit_net = []
unit_vat = []

cogs_sold_gross = []
input_vat_sold = []
cogs_sold_net = []

profit_cash = []
roi_cash = []
profit_vat = []
roi_vat = []

for _, row in base.iterrows():
    sku = str(row['sku'])
    net_qty = Decimal(str(int(row['net_qty'])))
    proceeds = D(row['NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld'])

    if sku not in COGS_MAP:
        cogs_source_note.append('UNVERIFIABLE — missing invoice mapping')
        unit_gross.append(None)
        unit_net.append(None)
        unit_vat.append(None)
        cogs_sold_gross.append(None)
        input_vat_sold.append(None)
        cogs_sold_net.append(None)
        profit_cash.append(None)
        roi_cash.append(None)
        profit_vat.append(None)
        roi_vat.append(None)
        continue

    m = COGS_MAP[sku]
    note = m['invoice_note']
    net_total = m['net_total']
    purchased_components = m['purchased_components']
    bundle_multiplier = m['bundle_multiplier']

    # Per-Amazon-unit costs
    # unit_net = (invoice net total / purchased_components) * bundle_multiplier
    unit_net_ex = (net_total / purchased_components) * bundle_multiplier
    unit_input_vat = unit_net_ex * VAT_RATE
    unit_gross_in = unit_net_ex + unit_input_vat

    # Sold costs based on sold fraction
    used_components = net_qty * bundle_multiplier
    frac = Decimal('0') if purchased_components == 0 else (used_components / purchased_components)
    sold_net = net_total * frac
    sold_vat = sold_net * VAT_RATE
    sold_gross = sold_net + sold_vat

    p_cash = proceeds - sold_gross
    p_vat = proceeds - sold_net

    # ROI definitions
    r_cash = None if sold_gross == 0 else (p_cash / sold_gross)
    r_vat = None if sold_net == 0 else (p_vat / sold_net)

    cogs_source_note.append(note)
    unit_gross.append(q2(unit_gross_in))
    unit_net.append(q2(unit_net_ex))
    unit_vat.append(q2(unit_input_vat))

    cogs_sold_gross.append(q2(sold_gross))
    input_vat_sold.append(q2(sold_vat))
    cogs_sold_net.append(q2(sold_net))

    profit_cash.append(q2(p_cash))
    roi_cash.append(None if r_cash is None else q4(r_cash))
    profit_vat.append(q2(p_vat))
    roi_vat.append(None if r_vat is None else q4(r_vat))

base['cogs_source_note'] = cogs_source_note
base['COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat'] = unit_gross
base['COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat'] = unit_net
base['INPUT_VAT_per_unit'] = unit_vat
base['COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat'] = cogs_sold_gross
base['INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units'] = input_vat_sold
base['COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat'] = cogs_sold_net
base['PROFIT_cash_products_only'] = profit_cash
base['ROI_cash'] = roi_cash
base['PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only'] = profit_vat
base['ROI_after_vat'] = roi_vat

# Format first/last order as date
base['first_order'] = pd.to_datetime(base['first_order']).dt.date
base['last_order'] = pd.to_datetime(base['last_order']).dt.date

# Ensure quantities are ints
for c in ['order_qty','refund_qty','net_qty']:
    base[c] = base[c].astype(float).round(0).astype('Int64')

# Requested final column order
final_cols = [
    'sku','description','first_order','last_order','order_qty','refund_qty','net_qty',
    'REV_product_sales_ex_vat','REV_vat_charged_to_customer','REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon',
    'FEE_selling_fees','FEE_fba_fees','FEE_other_tx_fees','NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld',
    'cogs_source_note','COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat','COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat','INPUT_VAT_per_unit',
    'COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat','INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units','COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat',
    'PROFIT_cash_products_only','ROI_cash','PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only','ROI_after_vat'
]

sku_table = base[final_cols].copy().sort_values('sku')

# ---------- Overheads from Payments XLSX ----------
pxl = pd.ExcelFile(pay_path)
pay = pd.read_excel(pxl, sheet_name=pxl.sheet_names[0])

required_pay_cols = ['Date','Transaction type','Order ID','Product Details','Total (GBP)']
missing_pay = [c for c in required_pay_cols if c not in pay.columns]
if missing_pay:
    raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in payments export: {missing_pay}")

pay['Total (GBP)'] = pd.to_numeric(pay['Total (GBP)'], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

storage_total = float(pay[pay['Product Details'].astype(str).str.contains('storage fee', case=False, na=False)]['Total (GBP)'].sum())
inbound_total = float(pay[pay['Product Details'].astype(str).str.contains('Inbound Transportation', case=False, na=False)]['Total (GBP)'].sum())
subscription_total = float(pay[pay['Product Details'].astype(str).str.contains('Subscription', case=False, na=False)]['Total (GBP)'].sum())

prep_gross = 70.00
prep_vat = 11.67
prep_net = round(prep_gross - prep_vat, 2)

overheads = pd.DataFrame([
    {'cost_type':'Storage fees','source':'Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx','rule':'Product Details contains "storage fee"','amount_gbp':round(storage_total,2)},
    {'cost_type':'Inbound transport fees','source':'Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx','rule':'Product Details contains "Inbound Transportation"','amount_gbp':round(inbound_total,2)},
    {'cost_type':'Monthly subscription fees','source':'Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx','rule':'Product Details contains "Subscription"','amount_gbp':round(subscription_total,2)},
    {'cost_type':'Prep fees (gross incl VAT)','source':'User provided','rule':'gross=70 VAT=11.67 net=58.33','amount_gbp':round(-prep_gross,2)},
])

# ---------- Summary ----------
# Totals (product-only)
# Convert Decimal-like columns that are stored as Decimal objects back to float for summary

# Some columns are Decimal or None; coerce carefully

def dec_or_zero(v):
    if v is None or (isinstance(v,float) and pd.isna(v)):
        return Decimal('0')
    if isinstance(v, str):
        return Decimal('0')
    return D(v)

cogs_gross_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat'])
cogs_net_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat'])
profit_cash_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['PROFIT_cash_products_only'])
profit_vat_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only'])

roi_cash_total = None if cogs_gross_total == 0 else (profit_cash_total / cogs_gross_total)
roi_vat_total = None if cogs_net_total == 0 else (profit_vat_total / cogs_net_total)

# Overheads totals
storage_dec = D(storage_total)
inbound_dec = D(inbound_total)
subs_dec = D(subscription_total)
prep_gross_dec = D(prep_gross)
prep_net_dec = D(prep_net)

overheads_cash_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_gross_dec

overheads_vat_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_net_dec

net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total
net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

summary = pd.DataFrame([
    {'metric':'Total product profit (cash view)','value_gbp':float(q2(profit_cash_total))},
    {'metric':'Total product ROI (cash view)','value': None if roi_cash_total is None else float(q4(roi_cash_total))},
    {'metric':'Total product profit (after input VAT reclaim)','value_gbp':float(q2(profit_vat_total))},
    {'metric':'Total product ROI (after input VAT reclaim)','value': None if roi_vat_total is None else float(q4(roi_vat_total))},
    {'metric':'Overheads total (cash view)','value_gbp':float(q2(overheads_cash_total))},
    {'metric':'Overheads total (after VAT reclaim view)','value_gbp':float(q2(overheads_vat_total))},
    {'metric':'Net business profit (cash view)','value_gbp':float(q2(net_profit_cash))},
    {'metric':'Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)','value_gbp':float(q2(net_profit_vat))},
])

notes = pd.DataFrame([
    {'notes':'Payments export contains a storage fee row dated 2026-08-01; included as source-of-truth.'},
    {'notes':'COGS computed from supplier invoices (discount/shipping allocated pro-rata by line value).'},
    {'notes':'Qogita items mapped to Amazon SKUs by product description (verify if needed).'},
])

# ---------- Write Excel ----------
with pd.ExcelWriter(out_path, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
    sku_table.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='SKU_Profitability', index=False)
    overheads.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Overheads', index=False)
    summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Summary', index=False)
    notes.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Notes', index=False)

print('WROTE:', out_path)
print('SKU rows:', len(sku_table))
print('Overheads rows:', len(overheads))
PY

tool_input.description: Generate Excel profitability workbook from exports
tool_input.command:
python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP
import datetime as dt

custom_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
pay_path = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")

out_path = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    if x is None:
        return Decimal('0')
    # for floats, str() is OK here because inputs are 2dp-like already
    return Decimal(str(x))

def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.01'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal('0.0001'), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

# ---------- Load Custom Transaction (SKU-level) ----------
xl = pd.ExcelFile(custom_path)
df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

required_cols = [
    'date/time','type','order id','sku','description','quantity','product sales','product sales tax',
    'marketplace withheld tax','selling fees','fba fees','other transaction fees','total'
]
missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

df['sku'] = df['sku'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['type'] = df['type'].astype('string').str.strip()
df['description'] = df['description'].astype('string')
df['date/time'] = pd.to_datetime(df['date/time'], errors='coerce', utc=True)

for c in ['quantity','product sales','product sales tax','marketplace withheld tax','selling fees','fba fees','other transaction fees','total']:
    df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

sku_df = df[df['sku'].notna()].copy()

# Core aggregates
order_rows = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Order')]
refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df['type'].eq('Refund')]
non_transfer_rows = sku_df[~sku_df['type'].eq('Transfer')]

agg = non_transfer_rows.groupby('sku', dropna=False).agg(
    REV_product_sales_ex_vat=('product sales','sum'),
    REV_vat_charged_to_customer=('product sales tax','sum'),
    REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon=('marketplace withheld tax','sum'),
    FEE_selling_fees=('selling fees','sum'),
    FEE_fba_fees=('fba fees','sum'),
    FEE_other_tx_fees=('other transaction fees','sum'),
    NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld=('total','sum'),
)

qty = sku_df.groupby('sku').agg(
    order_qty=('quantity', lambda s: float(order_rows.loc[s.index, 'quantity'].sum()) if len(s.index) else 0.0),
    refund_qty=('quantity', lambda s: float(refund_rows.loc[s.index, 'quantity'].sum()) if len(s.index) else 0.0),
)
# above lambda approach is clunky; compute directly for safety
order_qty = order_rows.groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum().rename('order_qty')
refund_qty = refund_rows.groupby('sku')['quantity'].sum().rename('refund_qty')
qty = pd.concat([order_qty, refund_qty], axis=1).fillna(0)
qty['net_qty'] = qty['order_qty'] - qty['refund_qty']

# first/last order dates per sku (Order rows only)
first_order = order_rows.groupby('sku')['date/time'].min().rename('first_order')
last_order = order_rows.groupby('sku')['date/time'].max().rename('last_order')

# description: most common description among Order rows, fallback any

def top_desc(g: pd.Series):
    # choose most frequent non-null
    s = g.dropna().astype(str)
    if s.empty:
        return ''
    return s.value_counts().index[0]

desc = order_rows.groupby('sku')['description'].apply(top_desc).rename('description')

base = agg.join(qty, how='outer').join(first_order, how='left').join(last_order, how='left').join(desc, how='left')
base = base.reset_index().rename(columns={'sku':'sku'})

# ---------- COGS model from invoices + bundle rules ----------
# NOTE: values are taken from the supplier invoices previously extracted.
# Allocation rule: invoice-level discount/shipping/extra allocated pro-rata by line pre-adjustment value.

# Invoice: PoundWholesale order (10 Feb 2025 doc; file name: POUNDWHOLESALE SALES order_2025-02-11.pdf)
# Lines: SW1014A qty60 @0.73; SW1017 qty36 @1.36; discount 4.64; shipping 0
subtotal_sw = Decimal('60') * Decimal('0.73')
subtotal_sf = Decimal('36') * Decimal('1.36')
subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
pw_discount = Decimal('4.64')
SW1014A_net_total = subtotal_sw - (pw_discount * subtotal_sw / subtotal)
SW1017_net_total = subtotal_sf - (pw_discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

# Invoice: PoundWholesale invoice 1000061269 (26 Sep 2025 order; file name: invoice_2025-09-27_02-49-01.pdf)
# Lines: FS606 qty120 @2.32; 15110C qty36 @1.27; discount 64.82; shipping 54.95; tail lift 3.95
mugs_sub = Decimal('120') * Decimal('2.32')
pans_sub = Decimal('36') * Decimal('1.27')
sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub
pw2_discount = Decimal('64.82')
pw2_ship = Decimal('54.95')
pw2_extra = Decimal('3.95')
FS606_net_total = mugs_sub - (pw2_discount * mugs_sub / sub) + (pw2_ship * mugs_sub / sub) + (pw2_extra * mugs_sub / sub)
PANS15110C_net_total = pans_sub - (pw2_discount * pans_sub / sub) + (pw2_ship * pans_sub / sub) + (pw2_extra * pans_sub / sub)

# Invoice: Qogita A83QXGGZ4B (13 Jan 2025; file name: qogita invoice 1.pdf)
# Lines: 10 each; unit prices 12.41, 12.42, 12.41; discount 100.00
sumo_sub = Decimal('10') * Decimal('12.41')
curl_sub = Decimal('10') * Decimal('12.42')
thick_sub = Decimal('10') * Decimal('12.41')
q_sub = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub
q_disc = Decimal('100.00')
SUMO_net_total = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / q_sub)
CURL_net_total = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / q_sub)
THICK_net_total = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / q_sub)

VAT_RATE = Decimal('0.20')

        'purchased_components': Decimal('60'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('4'),
    },
    'SKU010': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (PoundWholesale order 2025-02-11; SW1017)',
        'net_total': SW1017_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('36'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('2'),
    },
    'SKU007': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PoundWholesale invoice 2025-09-27; FS606)',
        'net_total': FS606_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('120'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('2'),
    },
    'XL-Y0IQ-MIR5': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PoundWholesale invoice 2025-09-27; 15110C)',
        'net_total': PANS15110C_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('36'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('2'),
    },
    'SKU004': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Sumotech)',
        'net_total': SUMO_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('10'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('1'),
    },
    'SKU003': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Curl Moisturizing Shampoo)',
        'net_total': CURL_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('10'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('1'),
    },
    '7W-OAH2-Z5SB': {
        'invoice_note': 'Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Thickening Shampoo)',
        'net_total': THICK_net_total,
        'purchased_components': Decimal('10'),
        'bundle_multiplier': Decimal('1'),
    },
}

# Add COGS columns
cogs_source_note = []
unit_gross = []
unit_net = []
unit_vat = []

cogs_sold_gross = []
input_vat_sold = []
cogs_sold_net = []

profit_cash = []
roi_cash = []
profit_vat = []
roi_vat = []

for _, row in base.iterrows():
    sku = str(row['sku'])
    net_qty = Decimal(str(int(row['net_qty'])))
    proceeds = D(row['NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld'])

    if sku not in COGS_MAP:
        cogs_source_note.append('UNVERIFIABLE — missing invoice mapping')
        unit_gross.append(None)
        unit_net.append(None)
        unit_vat.append(None)

        cogs_sold_net.append(None)
        profit_cash.append(None)
        roi_cash.append(None)
        profit_vat.append(None)
        roi_vat.append(None)
        continue

    m = COGS_MAP[sku]
    note = m['invoice_note']
    net_total = m['net_total']
    purchased_components = m['purchased_components']
    bundle_multiplier = m['bundle_multiplier']

    # Per-Amazon-unit costs
    # unit_net = (invoice net total / purchased_components) * bundle_multiplier
    unit_net_ex = (net_total / purchased_components) * bundle_multiplier
    unit_input_vat = unit_net_ex * VAT_RATE

    # Sold costs based on sold fraction

    r_vat = None if sold_net == 0 else (p_vat / sold_net)

    cogs_source_note.append(note)
    unit_gross.append(q2(unit_gross_in))
    unit_net.append(q2(unit_net_ex))
    unit_vat.append(q2(unit_input_vat))

    cogs_sold_gross.append(q2(sold_gross))
    input_vat_sold.append(q2(sold_vat))
    cogs_sold_net.append(q2(sold_net))

    profit_cash.append(q2(p_cash))
    roi_cash.append(None if r_cash is None else q4(r_cash))
    profit_vat.append(q2(p_vat))
    roi_vat.append(None if r_vat is None else q4(r_vat))

base['cogs_source_note'] = cogs_source_note
base['COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat'] = unit_gross
base['COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat'] = unit_net
base['INPUT_VAT_per_unit'] = unit_vat
base['COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat'] = cogs_sold_gross
base['INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units'] = input_vat_sold
base['COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat'] = cogs_sold_net
base['PROFIT_cash_products_only'] = profit_cash
base['ROI_cash'] = roi_cash
base['PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only'] = profit_vat
base['ROI_after_vat'] = roi_vat

# Format first/last order as date
base['first_order'] = pd.to_datetime(base['first_order']).dt.date
base['last_order'] = pd.to_datetime(base['last_order']).dt.date

for c in ['order_qty','refund_qty','net_qty']:

    'REV_product_sales_ex_vat','REV_vat_charged_to_customer','REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon',

    'PROFIT_cash_products_only','ROI_cash','PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only','ROI_after_vat'
]

sku_table = base[final_cols].copy().sort_values('sku')

required_pay_cols = ['Date','Transaction type','Order ID','Product Details','Total (GBP)']
missing_pay = [c for c in required_pay_cols if c not in pay.columns]
if missing_pay:
    raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in payments export: {missing_pay}")

pay['Total (GBP)'] = pd.to_numeric(pay['Total (GBP)'], errors='coerce').fillna(0.0)

storage_total = float(pay[pay['Product Details'].astype(str).str.contains('storage fee', case=False, na=False)]['Total (GBP)'].sum())
inbound_total = float(pay[pay['Product Details'].astype(str).str.contains('Inbound Transportation', case=False, na=False)]['Total (GBP)'].sum())
subscription_total = float(pay[pay['Product Details'].astype(str).str.contains('Subscription', case=False, na=False)]['Total (GBP)'].sum())

prep_gross = 70.00
prep_vat = 11.67
prep_net = round(prep_gross - prep_vat, 2)

overheads = pd.DataFrame([
    {'cost_type':'Storage fees','source':'Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx','rule':'Product Details contains "storage fee"','amount_gbp':round(storage_total,2)},
    {'cost_type':'Inbound transport fees','source':'Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx','rule':'Product Details contains "Inbound Transportation"','amount_gbp':round(inbound_total,2)},
    {'cost_type':'Monthly subscription fees','source':'Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx','rule':'Product Details contains "Subscription"','amount_gbp':round(subscription_total,2)},
    {'cost_type':'Prep fees (gross incl VAT)','source':'User provided','rule':'gross=70 VAT=11.67 net=58.33','amount_gbp':round(-prep_gross,2)},
])

# ---------- Summary ----------
# Totals (product-only)
# Convert Decimal-like columns that are stored as Decimal objects back to float for summary

# Some columns are Decimal or None; coerce carefully

def dec_or_zero(v):
    if v is None or (isinstance(v,float) and pd.isna(v)):
        return Decimal('0')
    if isinstance(v, str):
        return Decimal('0')
    return D(v)

cogs_gross_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat'])
cogs_net_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat'])
profit_cash_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['PROFIT_cash_products_only'])
profit_vat_total = sum(dec_or_zero(v) for v in sku_table['PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only'])

roi_cash_total = None if cogs_gross_total == 0 else (profit_cash_total / cogs_gross_total)
roi_vat_total = None if cogs_net_total == 0 else (profit_vat_total / cogs_net_total)

# Overheads totals
storage_dec = D(storage_total)
inbound_dec = D(inbound_total)
subs_dec = D(subscription_total)
prep_gross_dec = D(prep_gross)
prep_net_dec = D(prep_net)

overheads_cash_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_gross_dec

overheads_vat_total = storage_dec + inbound_dec + subs_dec - prep_net_dec

net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total
net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

summary = pd.DataFrame([
    {'metric':'Total product profit (cash view)','value_gbp':float(q2(profit_cash_total))},
    {'metric':'Total product ROI (cash view)','value': None if roi_cash_total is None else float(q4(roi_cash_total))},
    {'metric':'Total product profit (after input VAT reclaim)','value_gbp':float(q2(profit_vat_total))},
    {'metric':'Total product ROI (after input VAT reclaim)','value': None if roi_vat_total is None else float(q4(roi_vat_total))},
    {'metric':'Overheads total (cash view)','value_gbp':float(q2(overheads_cash_total))},
    {'metric':'Overheads total (after VAT reclaim view)','value_gbp':float(q2(overheads_vat_total))},
    {'metric':'Net business profit (cash view)','value_gbp':float(q2(net_profit_cash))},
    {'metric':'Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)','value_gbp':float(q2(net_profit_vat))},
])

notes = pd.DataFrame([
    {'notes':'Payments export contains a storage fee row dated 2026-08-01; included as source-of-truth.'},
    {'notes':'COGS computed from supplier invoices (discount/shipping allocated pro-rata by line value).'},
    {'notes':'Qogita items mapped to Amazon SKUs by product description (verify if needed).'},
])

# ---------- Write Excel ----------
with pd.ExcelWriter(out_path, engine='openpyxl') as writer:
    sku_table.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='SKU_Profitability', index=False)
    overheads.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Overheads', index=False)
    summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Summary', index=False)
    notes.to_excel(writer, sheet_name='Notes', index=False)

print('WROTE:', out_path)
print('SKU rows:', len(sku_table))
print('Overheads rows:', len(overheads))
PY
