import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

# INPUTS (source-of-truth exports)
CUSTOM_TX_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
PAYMENTS_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")

# OUTPUT
OUT_PATH = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))


def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def top_desc(series: pd.Series) -> str:
    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]


def main() -> None:
    # ---------------------- CUSTOM TRANSACTION (SKU-level) ----------------------
    xl = pd.ExcelFile(CUSTOM_TX_PATH)
    df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

    required_cols = [
        "date/time",
        "type",
        "order id",
        "sku",
        "description",
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

    for c in ["sku", "type", "description"]:
        df[c] = df[c].astype("string").str.strip()
    df["date/time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date/time"], errors="coerce", utc=True)

    num_cols = [
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    for c in num_cols:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    sku_df = df[df["sku"].notna()].copy()
    order_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Order")]
    refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Refund")]
    non_transfer = sku_df[~sku_df["type"].eq("Transfer")]

    agg = non_transfer.groupby("sku").agg(
        REV_product_sales_ex_vat=("product sales", "sum"),
        REV_vat_charged_to_customer=("product sales tax", "sum"),
        REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon=("marketplace withheld tax", "sum"),
        FEE_selling_fees=("selling fees", "sum"),
        FEE_fba_fees=("fba fees", "sum"),
        FEE_other_tx_fees=("other transaction fees", "sum"),
        NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld=("total", "sum"),
    )

    qty = pd.concat(
        [
            order_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("order_qty"),
            refund_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("refund_qty"),
        ],
        axis=1,
    ).fillna(0)
    qty["net_qty"] = qty["order_qty"] - qty["refund_qty"]

    first_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].min().rename("first_order")
    last_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].max().rename("last_order")
    desc = order_rows.groupby("sku")["description"].apply(top_desc).rename("description")

    base = agg.join(qty, how="outer").join(first_order).join(last_order).join(desc)
    base = base.reset_index().rename(columns={"sku": "sku"})

    base["first_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["first_order"]).dt.date
    base["last_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["last_order"]).dt.date

    for c in ["order_qty", "refund_qty", "net_qty"]:
        base[c] = base[c].astype(float).round(0).astype("Int64")

    # ---------------------- COGS MODEL (invoices) ----------------------
    # NOTE: These invoice-derived amounts were extracted from supplier PDFs earlier.
    # Bundles applied once per your rules.
    VAT_RATE = Decimal("0.20")

    # PoundWholesale Feb 2025 order: SW1014A, SW1017, discount 4.64
    subtotal_sw = Decimal("60") * Decimal("0.73")
    subtotal_sf = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.36")
    subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
    pw_discount = Decimal("4.64")
    SW1014A_net_total = subtotal_sw - (pw_discount * subtotal_sw / subtotal)
    SW1017_net_total = subtotal_sf - (pw_discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

    # PoundWholesale Sep 2025 invoice: FS606, 15110C, discount 64.82, shipping 54.95, tail 3.95
    mugs_sub = Decimal("120") * Decimal("2.32")
    pans_sub = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.27")
    sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub
    pw2_discount = Decimal("64.82")
    pw2_ship = Decimal("54.95")
    pw2_extra = Decimal("3.95")
    FS606_net_total = (
        mugs_sub
        - (pw2_discount * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * mugs_sub / sub)
    )
    PANS15110C_net_total = (
        pans_sub
        - (pw2_discount * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * pans_sub / sub)
    )

    # Qogita Jan 2025 invoice: 3 lines, discount 100
    sumo_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    curl_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.42")
    thick_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    q_sub = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub
    q_disc = Decimal("100.00")
    SUMO_net_total = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / q_sub)
    CURL_net_total = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / q_sub)
    THICK_net_total = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / q_sub)

    COGS_MAP = {
        "SKU11": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1014A)",
            "net_total": SW1014A_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("60"),
            "bundle": Decimal("4"),
        },
        "SKU010": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1017)",
            "net_total": SW1017_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU007": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; FS606)",
            "net_total": FS606_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("120"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "XL-Y0IQ-MIR5": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; 15110C)",
            "net_total": PANS15110C_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU004": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Sumotech)",
            "net_total": SUMO_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "SKU003": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Curl Moisturizing Shampoo)",
            "net_total": CURL_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "7W-OAH2-Z5SB": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Thickening Shampoo)",
            "net_total": THICK_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
    }

    cogs_rows = []
    for _, r in base.iterrows():
        sku = str(r["sku"])
        net_qty = int(r["net_qty"])
        proceeds = D(r["NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld"])

        if sku not in COGS_MAP:
            cogs_rows.append(
                {
                    "cogs_source_note": "UNVERIFIABLE — missing invoice mapping",
                    "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": None,
                    "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": None,
                    "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "PROFIT_cash_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_cash": None,
                    "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_after_vat": None,
                }
            )
            continue

        m = COGS_MAP[sku]
        net_total = m["net_total"]
        purchased = m["purchased"]
        bundle = m["bundle"]

        unit_net = (net_total / purchased) * bundle
        unit_vat = unit_net * VAT_RATE
        unit_gross = unit_net + unit_vat

        used_components = Decimal(str(net_qty)) * bundle
        frac = used_components / purchased if purchased != 0 else Decimal("0")

        sold_net = net_total * frac
        sold_vat = sold_net * VAT_RATE
        sold_gross = sold_net + sold_vat

        profit_cash = proceeds - sold_gross
        profit_vat = proceeds - sold_net

        roi_cash = None if sold_gross == 0 else (profit_cash / sold_gross)
        roi_vat = None if sold_net == 0 else (profit_vat / sold_net)

        cogs_rows.append(
            {
                "cogs_source_note": m["note"],
                "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_gross)),
                "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_net)),
                "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": float(q2(unit_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_gross)),
                "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": float(q2(sold_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_net)),
                "PROFIT_cash_products_only": float(q2(profit_cash)),
                "ROI_cash": None if roi_cash is None else float(q4(roi_cash)),
                "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": float(q2(profit_vat)),
                "ROI_after_vat": None if roi_vat is None else float(q4(roi_vat)),
            }
        )

    base2 = pd.concat([base, pd.DataFrame(cogs_rows)], axis=1)

    final_cols = [
        "sku",
        "description",
        "first_order",
        "last_order",
        "order_qty",
        "refund_qty",
        "net_qty",
        "REV_product_sales_ex_vat",
        "REV_vat_charged_to_customer",
        "REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon",
        "FEE_selling_fees",
        "FEE_fba_fees",
        "FEE_other_tx_fees",
        "NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld",
        "cogs_source_note",
        "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_per_unit",
        "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units",
        "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat",
        "PROFIT_cash_products_only",
        "ROI_cash",
        "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only",
        "ROI_after_vat",
    ]

    sku_table = base2[final_cols].sort_values("sku").copy()

    # ---------------------- PAYMENTS (overheads) ----------------------
    pxl = pd.ExcelFile(PAYMENTS_PATH)
    pay = pd.read_excel(pxl, sheet_name=pxl.sheet_names[0])

    required_pay_cols = ["Date", "Transaction type", "Order ID", "Product Details", "Total (GBP)"]
    missing_pay = [c for c in required_pay_cols if c not in pay.columns]
    if missing_pay:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in payments export: {missing_pay}")

    pay["Total (GBP)"] = pd.to_numeric(pay["Total (GBP)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    storage_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("storage fee", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )
    inbound_total = float(
        pay[
            pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains(
                "Inbound Transportation", case=False, na=False
            )
        ]["Total (GBP)"].sum()
    )
    subscription_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("Subscription", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )

    # User-provided prep
    prep_gross = 70.00
    prep_vat = 11.67
    prep_net = round(prep_gross - prep_vat, 2)

    overheads = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {
                "cost_type": "Storage fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(storage_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "storage fee"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Inbound transport fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(inbound_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Inbound Transportation"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Monthly subscription fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(subscription_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Subscription"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Prep fees (gross incl VAT)",
                "amount_gbp": round(-prep_gross, 2),
                "source": "User provided",
                "rule": "gross=70 VAT=11.67 net=58.33",
            },
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- SUMMARY + REPORT ----------------------
    profit_cash_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_cash_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())
    profit_vat_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())

    cogs_gross_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())
    cogs_net_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())

    roi_cash_total = None if cogs_gross_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_cash_total) / D(cogs_gross_total)))
    roi_vat_total = None if cogs_net_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_vat_total) / D(cogs_net_total)))

    overheads_cash_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_gross
    overheads_vat_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_net

    net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total
    net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

    summary = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"metric": "Total product profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(profit_cash_total, 2)},
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (cash view)", "value": roi_cash_total},
            {
                "metric": "Total product profit (after input VAT reclaim)",
                "value_gbp": round(profit_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (after input VAT reclaim)", "value": roi_vat_total},
            {"metric": "Overheads total (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(overheads_cash_total, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Overheads total (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(overheads_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Net business profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(net_profit_cash, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(net_profit_vat, 2),
            },
        ]
    )

    report_lines = [
        "EXECUTIVE SUMMARY",
        f"- Product profit (cash view): {round(profit_cash_total,2)} GBP; ROI (cash): {roi_cash_total}",
        f"- Product profit (after input VAT reclaim): {round(profit_vat_total,2)} GBP; ROI (VAT): {roi_vat_total}",
        f"- Overheads (cash view): {round(overheads_cash_total,2)} GBP; Net business (cash): {round(net_profit_cash,2)} GBP",
        f"- Overheads (VAT view): {round(overheads_vat_total,2)} GBP; Net business (VAT): {round(net_profit_vat,2)} GBP",
        "",
        "KEY ISSUES",
        "- Low-priced bundles (SKU11, SKU010) carry heavy FBA fees relative to price.",
        "- SKU007 (mugs) is near break-even ex-VAT but negative in cash view because input VAT is a real cash cost until reclaimed.",
        "- Overheads (prep + storage + inbound) materially reduce cash profitability.",
        "",
        "DATA QUALITY NOTES",
        "- Payments XLSX includes a storage fee line dated 2026-08-01; included as exported.",
        "",
        "ASSUMPTIONS",
        "- Qogita invoice lines mapped to Amazon SKUs by product description (no GTIN↔SKU mapping in exports).",
    ]

    report_df = pd.DataFrame({"analysis": report_lines})

    notes = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"notes": "Per-SKU metrics computed from 2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx; non-Transfer rows summed."},
            {"notes": "Payments XLSX includes a storage fee dated 2026-08-01; included as exported."},
            {"notes": "COGS from supplier invoices; bundle rules applied once."},
            {"notes": "Assumption: Qogita mapping to Amazon SKUs is by product description."},
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- WRITE WORKBOOK ----------------------
    with pd.ExcelWriter(OUT_PATH, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
        sku_table.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="SKU_Profitability", index=False)
        overheads.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Overheads", index=False)
        summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Summary", index=False)
        report_df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Analysis", index=False)
        notes.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Notes", index=False)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

# INPUTS (source-of-truth exports)
CUSTOM_TX_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
PAYMENTS_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")

# OUTPUT
OUT_PATH = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))


def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def top_desc(series: pd.Series) -> str:
    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]


def main() -> None:
    # ---------------------- CUSTOM TRANSACTION (SKU-level) ----------------------
    xl = pd.ExcelFile(CUSTOM_TX_PATH)
    df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

    required_cols = [
        "date/time",
        "type",
        "order id",
        "sku",
        "description",
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

    for c in ["sku", "type", "description"]:
        df[c] = df[c].astype("string").str.strip()
    df["date/time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date/time"], errors="coerce", utc=True)

    num_cols = [
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    for c in num_cols:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    sku_df = df[df["sku"].notna()].copy()
    order_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Order")]
    refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Refund")]
    non_transfer = sku_df[~sku_df["type"].eq("Transfer")]

    agg = non_transfer.groupby("sku").agg(
        REV_product_sales_ex_vat=("product sales", "sum"),
        REV_vat_charged_to_customer=("product sales tax", "sum"),
        REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon=("marketplace withheld tax", "sum"),
        FEE_selling_fees=("selling fees", "sum"),
        FEE_fba_fees=("fba fees", "sum"),
        FEE_other_tx_fees=("other transaction fees", "sum"),
        NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld=("total", "sum"),
    )

    qty = pd.concat(
        [
            order_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("order_qty"),
            refund_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("refund_qty"),
        ],
        axis=1,
    ).fillna(0)
    qty["net_qty"] = qty["order_qty"] - qty["refund_qty"]

    first_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].min().rename("first_order")
    last_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].max().rename("last_order")
    desc = order_rows.groupby("sku")["description"].apply(top_desc).rename("description")

    base = agg.join(qty, how="outer").join(first_order).join(last_order).join(desc)
    base = base.reset_index().rename(columns={"sku": "sku"})

    base["first_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["first_order"]).dt.date
    base["last_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["last_order"]).dt.date

    for c in ["order_qty", "refund_qty", "net_qty"]:
        base[c] = base[c].astype(float).round(0).astype("Int64")

    # ---------------------- COGS MODEL (invoices) ----------------------
    # NOTE: These invoice-derived amounts were extracted from supplier PDFs earlier.
    # Bundles applied once per your rules.
    VAT_RATE = Decimal("0.20")

    # PoundWholesale Feb 2025 order: SW1014A, SW1017, discount 4.64
    subtotal_sw = Decimal("60") * Decimal("0.73")
    subtotal_sf = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.36")
    subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
    pw_discount = Decimal("4.64")
    SW1014A_net_total = subtotal_sw - (pw_discount * subtotal_sw / subtotal)
    SW1017_net_total = subtotal_sf - (pw_discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

    # PoundWholesale Sep 2025 invoice: FS606, 15110C, discount 64.82, shipping 54.95, tail 3.95
    mugs_sub = Decimal("120") * Decimal("2.32")
    pans_sub = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.27")
    sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub
    pw2_discount = Decimal("64.82")
    pw2_ship = Decimal("54.95")
    pw2_extra = Decimal("3.95")
    FS606_net_total = (
        mugs_sub
        - (pw2_discount * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * mugs_sub / sub)
    )
    PANS15110C_net_total = (
        pans_sub
        - (pw2_discount * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * pans_sub / sub)
    )

    # Qogita Jan 2025 invoice: 3 lines, discount 100
    sumo_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    curl_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.42")
    thick_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    q_sub = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub
    q_disc = Decimal("100.00")
    SUMO_net_total = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / q_sub)
    CURL_net_total = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / q_sub)
    THICK_net_total = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / q_sub)

    COGS_MAP = {
        "SKU11": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1014A)",
            "net_total": SW1014A_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("60"),
            "bundle": Decimal("4"),
        },
        "SKU010": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1017)",
            "net_total": SW1017_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU007": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; FS606)",
            "net_total": FS606_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("120"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "XL-Y0IQ-MIR5": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; 15110C)",
            "net_total": PANS15110C_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU004": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Sumotech)",
            "net_total": SUMO_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "SKU003": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Curl Moisturizing Shampoo)",
            "net_total": CURL_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "7W-OAH2-Z5SB": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Thickening Shampoo)",
            "net_total": THICK_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
    }

    cogs_rows = []
    for _, r in base.iterrows():
        sku = str(r["sku"])
        net_qty = int(r["net_qty"])
        proceeds = D(r["NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld"])

        if sku not in COGS_MAP:
            cogs_rows.append(
                {
                    "cogs_source_note": "UNVERIFIABLE — missing invoice mapping",
                    "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": None,
                    "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": None,
                    "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "PROFIT_cash_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_cash": None,
                    "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_after_vat": None,
                }
            )
            continue

        m = COGS_MAP[sku]
        net_total = m["net_total"]
        purchased = m["purchased"]
        bundle = m["bundle"]

        unit_net = (net_total / purchased) * bundle
        unit_vat = unit_net * VAT_RATE
        unit_gross = unit_net + unit_vat

        used_components = Decimal(str(net_qty)) * bundle
        frac = used_components / purchased if purchased != 0 else Decimal("0")

        sold_net = net_total * frac
        sold_vat = sold_net * VAT_RATE
        sold_gross = sold_net + sold_vat

        profit_cash = proceeds - sold_gross
        profit_vat = proceeds - sold_net

        roi_cash = None if sold_gross == 0 else (profit_cash / sold_gross)
        roi_vat = None if sold_net == 0 else (profit_vat / sold_net)

        cogs_rows.append(
            {
                "cogs_source_note": m["note"],
                "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_gross)),
                "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_net)),
                "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": float(q2(unit_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_gross)),
                "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": float(q2(sold_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_net)),
                "PROFIT_cash_products_only": float(q2(profit_cash)),
                "ROI_cash": None if roi_cash is None else float(q4(roi_cash)),
                "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": float(q2(profit_vat)),
                "ROI_after_vat": None if roi_vat is None else float(q4(roi_vat)),
            }
        )

    base2 = pd.concat([base, pd.DataFrame(cogs_rows)], axis=1)

    final_cols = [
        "sku",
        "description",
        "first_order",
        "last_order",
        "order_qty",
        "refund_qty",
        "net_qty",
        "REV_product_sales_ex_vat",
        "REV_vat_charged_to_customer",
        "REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon",
        "FEE_selling_fees",
        "FEE_fba_fees",
        "FEE_other_tx_fees",
        "NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld",
        "cogs_source_note",
        "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_per_unit",
        "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units",
        "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat",
        "PROFIT_cash_products_only",
        "ROI_cash",
        "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only",
        "ROI_after_vat",
    ]

    sku_table = base2[final_cols].sort_values("sku").copy()

    # ---------------------- PAYMENTS (overheads) ----------------------
    pxl = pd.ExcelFile(PAYMENTS_PATH)
    pay = pd.read_excel(pxl, sheet_name=pxl.sheet_names[0])

    required_pay_cols = ["Date", "Transaction type", "Order ID", "Product Details", "Total (GBP)"]
    missing_pay = [c for c in required_pay_cols if c not in pay.columns]
    if missing_pay:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in payments export: {missing_pay}")

    pay["Total (GBP)"] = pd.to_numeric(pay["Total (GBP)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    storage_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("storage fee", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )
    inbound_total = float(
        pay[
            pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains(
                "Inbound Transportation", case=False, na=False
            )
        ]["Total (GBP)"].sum()
    )
    subscription_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("Subscription", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )

    # User-provided prep
    prep_gross = 70.00
    prep_vat = 11.67
    prep_net = round(prep_gross - prep_vat, 2)

    overheads = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {
                "cost_type": "Storage fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(storage_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "storage fee"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Inbound transport fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(inbound_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Inbound Transportation"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Monthly subscription fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(subscription_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Subscription"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Prep fees (gross incl VAT)",
                "amount_gbp": round(-prep_gross, 2),
                "source": "User provided",
                "rule": "gross=70 VAT=11.67 net=58.33",
            },
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- SUMMARY + REPORT ----------------------
    profit_cash_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_cash_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())
    profit_vat_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())

    cogs_gross_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())
    cogs_net_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())

    roi_cash_total = None if cogs_gross_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_cash_total) / D(cogs_gross_total)))
    roi_vat_total = None if cogs_net_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_vat_total) / D(cogs_net_total)))

    overheads_cash_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_gross
    overheads_vat_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_net

    net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total
    net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

    summary = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"metric": "Total product profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(profit_cash_total, 2)},
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (cash view)", "value": roi_cash_total},
            {
                "metric": "Total product profit (after input VAT reclaim)",
                "value_gbp": round(profit_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (after input VAT reclaim)", "value": roi_vat_total},
            {"metric": "Overheads total (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(overheads_cash_total, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Overheads total (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(overheads_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Net business profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(net_profit_cash, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(net_profit_vat, 2),
            },
        ]
    )

    report_lines = [
        "EXECUTIVE SUMMARY",
        f"- Product profit (cash view): {round(profit_cash_total,2)} GBP; ROI (cash): {roi_cash_total}",
        f"- Product profit (after input VAT reclaim): {round(profit_vat_total,2)} GBP; ROI (VAT): {roi_vat_total}",
        f"- Overheads (cash view): {round(overheads_cash_total,2)} GBP; Net business (cash): {round(net_profit_cash,2)} GBP",
        f"- Overheads (VAT view): {round(overheads_vat_total,2)} GBP; Net business (VAT): {round(net_profit_vat,2)} GBP",
        "",
        "KEY ISSUES",
        "- Low-priced bundles (SKU11, SKU010) carry heavy FBA fees relative to price.",
        "- SKU007 (mugs) is near break-even ex-VAT but negative in cash view because input VAT is a real cash cost until reclaimed.",
        "- Overheads (prep + storage + inbound) materially reduce cash profitability.",
        "",
        "DATA QUALITY NOTES",
        "- Payments XLSX includes a storage fee line dated 2026-08-01; included as exported.",
        "",
        "ASSUMPTIONS",
        "- Qogita invoice lines mapped to Amazon SKUs by product description (no GTIN↔SKU mapping in exports).",
    ]

    report_df = pd.DataFrame({"analysis": report_lines})

    notes = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"notes": "Per-SKU metrics computed from 2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx; non-Transfer rows summed."},
            {"notes": "Payments XLSX includes a storage fee dated 2026-08-01; included as exported."},
            {"notes": "COGS from supplier invoices; bundle rules applied once."},
            {"notes": "Assumption: Qogita mapping to Amazon SKUs is by product description."},
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- WRITE WORKBOOK ----------------------
    with pd.ExcelWriter(OUT_PATH, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
        sku_table.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="SKU_Profitability", index=False)
        overheads.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Overheads", index=False)
        summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Summary", index=False)
        report_df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Analysis", index=False)
        notes.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Notes", index=False)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

def D(x) -> Decimal:
    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))


def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]

    net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

    summary = pd.DataFrame(

            {"metric": "Total product profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(profit_cash_total, 2)},

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

CUSTOM_TX_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
PAYMENTS_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")
OUT_PATH = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))


def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def top_desc(series: pd.Series) -> str:
    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]


def main() -> None:

    xl = pd.ExcelFile(CUSTOM_TX_PATH)
    df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

    required_cols = [
        "date/time",
        "type",
        "order id",
        "sku",
        "description",
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

    for c in ["sku", "type", "description"]:
        df[c] = df[c].astype("string").str.strip()
    df["date/time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date/time"], errors="coerce", utc=True)

    num_cols = [
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    for c in num_cols:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    sku_df = df[df["sku"].notna()].copy()
    order_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Order")]
    refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Refund")]
    non_transfer = sku_df[~sku_df["type"].eq("Transfer")]

    agg = non_transfer.groupby("sku").agg(
        REV_product_sales_ex_vat=("product sales", "sum"),
        REV_vat_charged_to_customer=("product sales tax", "sum"),
        REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon=("marketplace withheld tax", "sum"),
        FEE_selling_fees=("selling fees", "sum"),
        FEE_fba_fees=("fba fees", "sum"),
        FEE_other_tx_fees=("other transaction fees", "sum"),
        NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld=("total", "sum"),
    )

    qty = pd.concat(
        [
            order_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("order_qty"),
            refund_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("refund_qty"),
        ],
        axis=1,
    ).fillna(0)
    qty["net_qty"] = qty["order_qty"] - qty["refund_qty"]

    first_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].min().rename("first_order")
    last_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].max().rename("last_order")
    desc = order_rows.groupby("sku")["description"].apply(top_desc).rename("description")

    base = agg.join(qty, how="outer").join(first_order).join(last_order).join(desc)

    base["first_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["first_order"]).dt.date
    base["last_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["last_order"]).dt.date

    for c in ["order_qty", "refund_qty", "net_qty"]:
        base[c] = base[c].astype(float).round(0).astype("Int64")

    # Bundles applied once per your rules.
    VAT_RATE = Decimal("0.20")

    subtotal_sw = Decimal("60") * Decimal("0.73")

    subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
    pw_discount = Decimal("4.64")

    mugs_sub = Decimal("120") * Decimal("2.32")

    }

import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

CUSTOM_TX_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
PAYMENTS_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")
OUT_PATH = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))


def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def top_desc(series: pd.Series) -> str:
    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]


def main() -> None:

    xl = pd.ExcelFile(CUSTOM_TX_PATH)
    df = pd.read_excel(xl, sheet_name=xl.sheet_names[0], header=7)

    required_cols = [
        "date/time",
        "type",
        "order id",
        "sku",
        "description",
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    missing = [c for c in required_cols if c not in df.columns]
    if missing:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

    for c in ["sku", "type", "description"]:
        df[c] = df[c].astype("string").str.strip()
    df["date/time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date/time"], errors="coerce", utc=True)

    num_cols = [
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]
    for c in num_cols:
        df[c] = pd.to_numeric(df[c], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    sku_df = df[df["sku"].notna()].copy()
    order_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Order")]
    refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Refund")]
    non_transfer = sku_df[~sku_df["type"].eq("Transfer")]

    agg = non_transfer.groupby("sku").agg(
        REV_product_sales_ex_vat=("product sales", "sum"),
        REV_vat_charged_to_customer=("product sales tax", "sum"),
        REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon=("marketplace withheld tax", "sum"),
        FEE_selling_fees=("selling fees", "sum"),
        FEE_fba_fees=("fba fees", "sum"),
        FEE_other_tx_fees=("other transaction fees", "sum"),
        NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld=("total", "sum"),
    )

    qty = pd.concat(
        [
            order_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("order_qty"),
            refund_rows.groupby("sku")["quantity"].sum().rename("refund_qty"),
        ],
        axis=1,
    ).fillna(0)
    qty["net_qty"] = qty["order_qty"] - qty["refund_qty"]

    first_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].min().rename("first_order")
    last_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].max().rename("last_order")
    desc = order_rows.groupby("sku")["description"].apply(top_desc).rename("description")

    base = agg.join(qty, how="outer").join(first_order).join(last_order).join(desc)
    base = base.reset_index().rename(columns={"sku": "sku"})

    base["first_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["first_order"]).dt.date
    base["last_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["last_order"]).dt.date

    for c in ["order_qty", "refund_qty", "net_qty"]:
        base[c] = base[c].astype(float).round(0).astype("Int64")

    # ---------------------- COGS MODEL (invoices) ----------------------
    # NOTE: These invoice-derived amounts were extracted from supplier PDFs earlier.
    # Bundles applied once per your rules.
    VAT_RATE = Decimal("0.20")

    # PoundWholesale Feb 2025 order: SW1014A, SW1017, discount 4.64
    subtotal_sw = Decimal("60") * Decimal("0.73")
    subtotal_sf = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.36")
    subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
    pw_discount = Decimal("4.64")
    SW1014A_net_total = subtotal_sw - (pw_discount * subtotal_sw / subtotal)
    SW1017_net_total = subtotal_sf - (pw_discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

    # PoundWholesale Sep 2025 invoice: FS606, 15110C, discount 64.82, shipping 54.95, tail 3.95
    mugs_sub = Decimal("120") * Decimal("2.32")
    pans_sub = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.27")
    sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub
    pw2_discount = Decimal("64.82")
    pw2_ship = Decimal("54.95")
    pw2_extra = Decimal("3.95")
    FS606_net_total = (
        mugs_sub
        - (pw2_discount * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * mugs_sub / sub)
    )
    PANS15110C_net_total = (
        pans_sub
        - (pw2_discount * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * pans_sub / sub)
    )

    # Qogita Jan 2025 invoice: 3 lines, discount 100
    sumo_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    curl_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.42")
    thick_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    q_sub = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub
    q_disc = Decimal("100.00")
    SUMO_net_total = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / q_sub)
    CURL_net_total = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / q_sub)
    THICK_net_total = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / q_sub)

    COGS_MAP = {
        "SKU11": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1014A)",
            "net_total": SW1014A_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("60"),
            "bundle": Decimal("4"),
        },
        "SKU010": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1017)",
            "net_total": SW1017_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU007": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; FS606)",
            "net_total": FS606_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("120"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "XL-Y0IQ-MIR5": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; 15110C)",
            "net_total": PANS15110C_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU004": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Sumotech)",
            "net_total": SUMO_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "SKU003": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Curl Moisturizing Shampoo)",
            "net_total": CURL_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "7W-OAH2-Z5SB": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Thickening Shampoo)",
            "net_total": THICK_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
    }

    cogs_rows = []
    for _, r in base.iterrows():
        sku = str(r["sku"])
        net_qty = int(r["net_qty"])
        proceeds = D(r["NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld"])

        if sku not in COGS_MAP:
            cogs_rows.append(
                {
                    "cogs_source_note": "UNVERIFIABLE — missing invoice mapping",
                    "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": None,
                    "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": None,
                    "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "PROFIT_cash_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_cash": None,
                    "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_after_vat": None,
                }
            )
            continue

        m = COGS_MAP[sku]
        net_total = m["net_total"]
        purchased = m["purchased"]
        bundle = m["bundle"]

        unit_net = (net_total / purchased) * bundle
        unit_vat = unit_net * VAT_RATE
        unit_gross = unit_net + unit_vat

        used_components = Decimal(str(net_qty)) * bundle
        frac = used_components / purchased if purchased != 0 else Decimal("0")

        sold_net = net_total * frac
        sold_vat = sold_net * VAT_RATE
        sold_gross = sold_net + sold_vat

        profit_cash = proceeds - sold_gross
        profit_vat = proceeds - sold_net

        roi_cash = None if sold_gross == 0 else (profit_cash / sold_gross)
        roi_vat = None if sold_net == 0 else (profit_vat / sold_net)

        cogs_rows.append(
            {
                "cogs_source_note": m["note"],
                "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_gross)),
                "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_net)),
                "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": float(q2(unit_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_gross)),
                "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": float(q2(sold_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_net)),
                "PROFIT_cash_products_only": float(q2(profit_cash)),
                "ROI_cash": None if roi_cash is None else float(q4(roi_cash)),
                "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": float(q2(profit_vat)),
                "ROI_after_vat": None if roi_vat is None else float(q4(roi_vat)),
            }
        )

    base2 = pd.concat([base, pd.DataFrame(cogs_rows)], axis=1)

    final_cols = [
        "sku",
        "description",
        "first_order",
        "last_order",
        "order_qty",
        "refund_qty",
        "net_qty",
        "REV_product_sales_ex_vat",
        "REV_vat_charged_to_customer",
        "REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon",
        "FEE_selling_fees",
        "FEE_fba_fees",
        "FEE_other_tx_fees",
        "NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld",
        "cogs_source_note",
        "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_per_unit",
        "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units",
        "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat",
        "PROFIT_cash_products_only",
        "ROI_cash",
        "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only",
        "ROI_after_vat",
    ]

    sku_table = base2[final_cols].sort_values("sku").copy()

    # ---------------------- PAYMENTS (overheads) ----------------------
    pxl = pd.ExcelFile(PAYMENTS_PATH)
    pay = pd.read_excel(pxl, sheet_name=pxl.sheet_names[0])

    required_pay_cols = ["Date", "Transaction type", "Order ID", "Product Details", "Total (GBP)"]
    missing_pay = [c for c in required_pay_cols if c not in pay.columns]
    if missing_pay:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in payments export: {missing_pay}")

    pay["Total (GBP)"] = pd.to_numeric(pay["Total (GBP)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    storage_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("storage fee", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )
    inbound_total = float(
        pay[
            pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains(
                "Inbound Transportation", case=False, na=False
            )
        ]["Total (GBP)"].sum()
    )
    subscription_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("Subscription", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )

    # User-provided prep
    prep_gross = 70.00
    prep_vat = 11.67
    prep_net = round(prep_gross - prep_vat, 2)

    overheads = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {
                "cost_type": "Storage fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(storage_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "storage fee"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Inbound transport fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(inbound_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Inbound Transportation"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Monthly subscription fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(subscription_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Subscription"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Prep fees (gross incl VAT)",
                "amount_gbp": round(-prep_gross, 2),
                "source": "User provided",
                "rule": "gross=70 VAT=11.67 net=58.33",
            },
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- SUMMARY + REPORT ----------------------
    profit_cash_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_cash_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())
    profit_vat_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())

    cogs_gross_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())
    cogs_net_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())

    roi_cash_total = None if cogs_gross_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_cash_total) / D(cogs_gross_total)))
    roi_vat_total = None if cogs_net_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_vat_total) / D(cogs_net_total)))

    overheads_cash_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_gross
    overheads_vat_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_net

    net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total
    net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

    summary = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"metric": "Total product profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(profit_cash_total, 2)},
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (cash view)", "value": roi_cash_total},
            {
                "metric": "Total product profit (after input VAT reclaim)",
                "value_gbp": round(profit_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (after input VAT reclaim)", "value": roi_vat_total},
            {"metric": "Overheads total (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(overheads_cash_total, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Overheads total (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(overheads_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Net business profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(net_profit_cash, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(net_profit_vat, 2),
            },
        ]
    )

    report_lines = [
        "EXECUTIVE SUMMARY",
        f"- Product profit (cash view): {round(profit_cash_total,2)} GBP; ROI (cash): {roi_cash_total}",
        f"- Product profit (after input VAT reclaim): {round(profit_vat_total,2)} GBP; ROI (VAT): {roi_vat_total}",
        f"- Overheads (cash view): {round(overheads_cash_total,2)} GBP; Net business (cash): {round(net_profit_cash,2)} GBP",
        f"- Overheads (VAT view): {round(overheads_vat_total,2)} GBP; Net business (VAT): {round(net_profit_vat,2)} GBP",
        "",
        "KEY ISSUES",
        "- Low-priced bundles (SKU11, SKU010) carry heavy FBA fees relative to price.",
        "- SKU007 (mugs) is near break-even ex-VAT but negative in cash view because input VAT is a real cash cost until reclaimed.",
        "- Overheads (prep + storage + inbound) materially reduce cash profitability.",
        "",
        "DATA QUALITY NOTES",
        "- Payments XLSX includes a storage fee line dated 2026-08-01; included as exported.",
        "",
        "ASSUMPTIONS",
        "- Qogita invoice lines mapped to Amazon SKUs by product description (no GTIN↔SKU mapping in exports).",
    ]

    report_df = pd.DataFrame({"analysis": report_lines})

    notes = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"notes": "Per-SKU metrics computed from 2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx; non-Transfer rows summed."},
            {"notes": "Payments XLSX includes a storage fee dated 2026-08-01; included as exported."},
            {"notes": "COGS from supplier invoices; bundle rules applied once."},
            {"notes": "Assumption: Qogita mapping to Amazon SKUs is by product description."},
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- WRITE WORKBOOK ----------------------
    with pd.ExcelWriter(OUT_PATH, engine="openpyxl") as writer:
        sku_table.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="SKU_Profitability", index=False)
        overheads.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Overheads", index=False)
        summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Summary", index=False)
        report_df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Analysis", index=False)
        notes.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Notes", index=False)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    qty["net_qty"] = qty["order_qty"] - qty["refund_qty"]

    first_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].min().rename("first_order")
    last_order = order_rows.groupby("sku")["date/time"].max().rename("last_order")
    desc = order_rows.groupby("sku")["description"].apply(top_desc).rename("description")

    base = agg.join(qty, how="outer").join(first_order).join(last_order).join(desc)
    base = base.reset_index().rename(columns={"sku": "sku"})

    base["first_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["first_order"]).dt.date
    base["last_order"] = pd.to_datetime(base["last_order"]).dt.date

    for c in ["order_qty", "refund_qty", "net_qty"]:
        base[c] = base[c].astype(float).round(0).astype("Int64")


    VAT_RATE = Decimal("0.20")

    # PoundWholesale Feb 2025 order: SW1014A, SW1017, discount 4.64
    subtotal_sw = Decimal("60") * Decimal("0.73")
    subtotal_sf = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.36")
    subtotal = subtotal_sw + subtotal_sf
    pw_discount = Decimal("4.64")
    SW1014A_net_total = subtotal_sw - (pw_discount * subtotal_sw / subtotal)
    SW1017_net_total = subtotal_sf - (pw_discount * subtotal_sf / subtotal)

    # PoundWholesale Sep 2025 invoice: FS606, 15110C, discount 64.82, shipping 54.95, tail 3.95
    mugs_sub = Decimal("120") * Decimal("2.32")
    pans_sub = Decimal("36") * Decimal("1.27")
    sub = mugs_sub + pans_sub
    pw2_discount = Decimal("64.82")
    pw2_ship = Decimal("54.95")
    pw2_extra = Decimal("3.95")
    FS606_net_total = (

        - (pw2_discount * mugs_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * mugs_sub / sub)

    )
    PANS15110C_net_total = (

        - (pw2_discount * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_ship * pans_sub / sub)
        + (pw2_extra * pans_sub / sub)
    )

    sumo_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    curl_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.42")
    thick_sub = Decimal("10") * Decimal("12.41")
    q_sub = sumo_sub + curl_sub + thick_sub
    q_disc = Decimal("100.00")
    SUMO_net_total = sumo_sub - (q_disc * sumo_sub / q_sub)
    CURL_net_total = curl_sub - (q_disc * curl_sub / q_sub)
    THICK_net_total = thick_sub - (q_disc * thick_sub / q_sub)

    COGS_MAP = {
        "SKU11": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1014A)",
            "net_total": SW1014A_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("60"),
            "bundle": Decimal("4"),
        },
        "SKU010": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (PW order 2025-02-11; SW1017)",
            "net_total": SW1017_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU007": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; FS606)",
            "net_total": FS606_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("120"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "XL-Y0IQ-MIR5": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation incl shipping/tail (PW invoice 2025-09-27; 15110C)",
            "net_total": PANS15110C_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("36"),
            "bundle": Decimal("2"),
        },
        "SKU004": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Sumotech)",
            "net_total": SUMO_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "SKU003": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Curl Moisturizing Shampoo)",
            "net_total": CURL_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
        "7W-OAH2-Z5SB": {
            "note": "Derived by pro-rata allocation (Qogita invoice A83QXGGZ4B; Thickening Shampoo)",
            "net_total": THICK_net_total,
            "purchased": Decimal("10"),
            "bundle": Decimal("1"),
        },
    }

    cogs_rows = []
    for _, r in base.iterrows():
        sku = str(r["sku"])
        net_qty = int(r["net_qty"])
        proceeds = D(r["NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld"])

        if sku not in COGS_MAP:
            cogs_rows.append(
                {
                    "cogs_source_note": "UNVERIFIABLE — missing invoice mapping",
                    "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": None,
                    "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": None,
                    "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": None,
                    "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": None,
                    "PROFIT_cash_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_cash": None,
                    "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": None,
                    "ROI_after_vat": None,
                }
            )
            continue

        m = COGS_MAP[sku]
        net_total = m["net_total"]
        purchased = m["purchased"]
        bundle = m["bundle"]

        unit_net = (net_total / purchased) * bundle
        unit_vat = unit_net * VAT_RATE
        unit_gross = unit_net + unit_vat

        used_components = Decimal(str(net_qty)) * bundle
        frac = used_components / purchased if purchased != 0 else Decimal("0")

        sold_vat = sold_net * VAT_RATE
        sold_gross = sold_net + sold_vat

        profit_cash = proceeds - sold_gross
        profit_vat = proceeds - sold_net

        roi_vat = None if sold_net == 0 else (profit_vat / sold_net)

            {
                "cogs_source_note": m["note"],
                "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_gross)),
                "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(unit_net)),
                "INPUT_VAT_per_unit": float(q2(unit_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_gross)),
                "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": float(q2(sold_vat)),
                "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat": float(q2(sold_net)),
                "PROFIT_cash_products_only": float(q2(profit_cash)),
                "ROI_cash": None if roi_cash is None else float(q4(roi_cash)),
                "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": float(q2(profit_vat)),
                "ROI_after_vat": None if roi_vat is None else float(q4(roi_vat)),
            }
        )

        "first_order",
        "last_order",
        "order_qty",
        "refund_qty",
        "net_qty",
        "REV_product_sales_ex_vat",
        "REV_vat_charged_to_customer",
        "REV_vat_withheld_by_amazon",
        "FEE_selling_fees",
        "FEE_fba_fees",
        "FEE_other_tx_fees",
        "NET_proceeds_after_fees_and_vat_withheld",
        "cogs_source_note",
        "COGS_unit_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "COGS_unit_net_excl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_per_unit",
        "COGS_sold_gross_incl_input_vat",
        "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units",
        "COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat",
        "PROFIT_cash_products_only",
        "ROI_cash",
        "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only",
        "ROI_after_vat",
    ]

    sku_table = base2[final_cols].sort_values("sku").copy()

    pxl = pd.ExcelFile(PAYMENTS_PATH)

    required_pay_cols = ["Date", "Transaction type", "Order ID", "Product Details", "Total (GBP)"]
    missing_pay = [c for c in required_pay_cols if c not in pay.columns]
    if missing_pay:
        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in payments export: {missing_pay}")

    pay["Total (GBP)"] = pd.to_numeric(pay["Total (GBP)"], errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)

    storage_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("storage fee", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )
    inbound_total = float(
        pay[
            pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains(
                "Inbound Transportation", case=False, na=False
            )
        ]["Total (GBP)"].sum()
    )
    subscription_total = float(
        pay[pay["Product Details"].astype(str).str.contains("Subscription", case=False, na=False)][
            "Total (GBP)"
        ].sum()
    )

    # User-provided prep
    prep_gross = 70.00
    prep_vat = 11.67
    prep_net = round(prep_gross - prep_vat, 2)

        [
            {
                "cost_type": "Storage fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(storage_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "storage fee"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Inbound transport fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(inbound_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Inbound Transportation"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Monthly subscription fees",
                "amount_gbp": round(subscription_total, 2),
                "source": "Payments XLSX",
                "rule": 'Product Details contains "Subscription"',
            },
            {
                "cost_type": "Prep fees (gross incl VAT)",
                "amount_gbp": round(-prep_gross, 2),
                "source": "User provided",
                "rule": "gross=70 VAT=11.67 net=58.33",
            },
        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- SUMMARY + REPORT ----------------------
    profit_cash_total = float(sku_table["PROFIT_cash_products_only"].fillna(0).sum())

    cogs_net_total = float(sku_table["COGS_sold_net_excl_input_vat"].fillna(0).sum())

    roi_cash_total = None if cogs_gross_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_cash_total) / D(cogs_gross_total)))
    roi_vat_total = None if cogs_net_total == 0 else float(q4(D(profit_vat_total) / D(cogs_net_total)))

    overheads_cash_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_gross
    overheads_vat_total = storage_total + inbound_total + subscription_total - prep_net

    net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total
    net_profit_vat = profit_vat_total + overheads_vat_total

    summary = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"metric": "Total product profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(profit_cash_total, 2)},

                "metric": "Total product profit (after input VAT reclaim)",
                "value_gbp": round(profit_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Total product ROI (after input VAT reclaim)", "value": roi_vat_total},
            {"metric": "Overheads total (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(overheads_cash_total, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Overheads total (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(overheads_vat_total, 2),
            },
            {"metric": "Net business profit (cash view)", "value_gbp": round(net_profit_cash, 2)},
            {
                "metric": "Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(net_profit_vat, 2),
            },
        ]

    report_lines = [

        f"- Product profit (after input VAT reclaim): {round(profit_vat_total,2)} GBP; ROI (VAT): {roi_vat_total}",

        f"- Overheads (VAT view): {round(overheads_vat_total,2)} GBP; Net business (VAT): {round(net_profit_vat,2)} GBP",
        "",
        "KEY ISSUES",
        "- Low-priced bundles (SKU11, SKU010) carry heavy FBA fees relative to price.",
        "- SKU007 (mugs) is near break-even ex-VAT but negative in cash view because input VAT is a real cash cost until reclaimed.",
        "- Overheads (prep + storage + inbound) materially reduce cash profitability.",
        "",
        "DATA QUALITY NOTES",
        "- Payments XLSX includes a storage fee line dated 2026-08-01; included as exported.",
        "",
        "ASSUMPTIONS",

    notes = pd.DataFrame(
        [
            {"notes": "Per-SKU metrics computed from 2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx; non-Transfer rows summed."},

        ]
    )

    # ---------------------- WRITE WORKBOOK ----------------------
    with pd.ExcelWriter(OUT_PATH, engine="openpyxl") as writer:

        summary.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Summary", index=False)
        report_df.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Analysis", index=False)
        notes.to_excel(writer, sheet_name="Notes", index=False)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))

    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)

    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]

                "INPUT_VAT_in_sold_units": float(q2(sold_vat)),

                "ROI_cash": None if roi_cash is None else float(q4(roi_cash)),
                "PROFIT_after_input_vat_products_only": float(q2(profit_vat)),
                "ROI_after_vat": None if roi_vat is None else float(q4(roi_vat)),

    net_profit_cash = profit_cash_total + overheads_cash_total

from decimal import Decimal, ROUND_HALF_UP

CUSTOM_TX_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\2024Jan1-2026Feb1CustomTransaction.xlsx")
PAYMENTS_PATH = Path(r"C:\idrive -carlo\Cloud-Drive_carloboul57@gmail.com\Cloud-Drive\Full\AMAZON_FRESH\INVOICES\Transactions until 02_02_2026.xlsx")
OUT_PATH = Path(r"C:\Users\chris\amazon_profitability_report.xlsx")


def D(x) -> Decimal:
    return Decimal("0") if x is None else Decimal(str(x))


def q2(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.01"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def q4(x: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    return x.quantize(Decimal("0.0001"), rounding=ROUND_HALF_UP)


def top_desc(series: pd.Series) -> str:
    s = series.dropna().astype(str)
    return "" if s.empty else s.value_counts().index[0]

    xl = pd.ExcelFile(CUSTOM_TX_PATH)

        "date/time",
        "type",
        "order id",
        "sku",
        "description",
        "quantity",
        "product sales",
        "product sales tax",
        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",
        "other transaction fees",
        "total",
    ]

        raise SystemExit(f"UNVERIFIABLE — missing columns in custom export: {missing}")

        "quantity",

        "marketplace withheld tax",
        "selling fees",
        "fba fees",

    ]

    sku_df = df[df["sku"].notna()].copy()
    order_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Order")]
    refund_rows = sku_df[sku_df["type"].eq("Refund")]
    non_transfer = sku_df[~sku_df["type"].eq("Transfer")]

    agg = non_transfer.groupby("sku").agg(
        REV_product_sales_ex_vat=("product sales", "sum"),

                "metric": "Net business profit (after VAT reclaim view)",
                "value_gbp": round(net_profit_vat, 2),
            },
        ]
    )
